TEXT.Text: Dragon Fellowship (1)
Do you have all of them? I guess not... Please hurry.
Look here %class%, do you think you can help me? We have news that monsters have appeared in front of the town. %% I can't vanquish them alone. Can you help me get rid of these horrible creatures?
I think you would be of great help. Please help us defeat these monsters.
Quest Complete!
It's not enough yet
You haven't left yet?
Bring the sword to Vincent
I'm sorry for bothering you, please give this sword to Vincent.
How can I help you?
What's the matter?
Woodi Legs
How can I trust your word on how many you'd slay? You need to bring back 20 Woodi Trunks as evidence.
Still short?
Please hurry.
You haven't left yet?
Amazing!%% You are stronger than I ever thought. Evan has trained you well. Good job!
You haven't slain them all yet, have you?
Alvin's Wish (1)
Hurry up.
You lost the certificate I gave you? Don't worry, I managed to retrieve it. Thanks again.
What's the matter?
Hmmm, Isn't this Alvin's certificate?%% You came in his stead?%% That old man. He's so lazy nowadays. Hand it over to me. I'll give you the box in return%%
Do you have my box? Guess not! Could you hurry up?
Find Alvin's box

Would you listen to me? %% This is the place... The place where the prophesised warrior is rumoured to have been chosen.%% That is the reason why all these young men crowd here and I used to be one of them...%% You know what... I thought I was the chosen one but I've become old and weak.%%Anyway I'd like to ask you something, could you grant me this favour?%% I have this thing I gave to Davy not long ago and I bought it with my life savings.%%Could you get it back for me?
Will you do me a favour? I have this thing I gave to Davy not long ago and I bought it with my life savings. Could you bring it back for me?
Wh... what? You mean I need to give it back? No, I don't want to! Please reconsider!
Show me some proof first before I hand it over to you.
Please hurry.
You haven't left yet, have you?
Did you slay them all?
You're back. So, did you slay all the Raccoons?
What a shame, You still haven't caught them all?

This is the finest piece of workmanship I've ever done. There may never be a sword like this again!%% What do you think? Would you like to try it out? You two seem to be a perfect pair!%% Of course I can't just give it to you for free. You can't just handle such a perfectly crafted item without any experience.%% So I was thinking... what about all the raccoons around here?%% How about you slay around, {C=0xFF016295/}12 Raccoons{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in exchange for this sword. What do you think? Fair enough?
You should hurry before the sword finds another owner.
You haven't left yet?
Alvin's Wish (2)
You haven't left yet? Please hurry, Alvin is waiting.
What? You've lost the box? I'll give you another chance, just make sure that you get it there this time.
What's the matter?
Do you have my box?%% That's it! Great!%% Thank you so much.I swear I'll repay you.
Where's my box?
Deliver the box to Alvin.
Why is he always like that? Good thing is, I don't have to bring it to him myself.%% Just a second.%% Here you go, please make sure he gets it.
Please take good care of it.

You killed them all? What the heck? That is amazing!%% (This doesn't look good. I guess I'll have to give him something good...)%% Here, look at this! While you've been out killing {C=0xFF016295/}Shamans{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, I found this enchancement powder! You can make your weapons really powerful with this stuff. Take it. Please use it wisely. *sniff*
You haven't caught them yet, have you?
Do you need help?
What happened? What's going on with the emergency rations?
What's the matter?

Wow... Food... Delicious food. Wookiboki just saw {C=0xFF016295/}Sharpo{C=0xFF4D0D08/} just passed by with a bag with fantastic smell. I want to have some Hehe--%% I just heard what he called and he called it as {C=0xFF016295/}Emergency Rations{C=0xFF4D0D08/} supply! I want Emergency Rations too! %% get 'em from Sharpos and share 'em wit me, will you? Omnomnom.
Amazing! I'm so surprised!
There isn't enough!
Please hurry!
How can I help you?
Yey! You brought them all! Oh.They are all fresh, perfect!
Dances with wolves
Do you need help?
You're already done?%%Oh, you're not? Let me know as soon as you get rid of {C=0xFF016295/}12 Ash Wolves{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Please hurry.
What's the matter?
I heard that you finished them off. Thank you so much! I insist you take this small token of my appreciation. I hope you'll be around to protect the town more in the future.
You haven't caught them yet, have you?

Complaints about rampant {C=0xFF016295/}Ash Wolves{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}South Windia Plains{C=0xFF4D0D08/} are pouring in.%% And because of that travelling has become unsafe. I must protect the town at all times but unfortunately I cannot leave. I urge you, %class%, to help us.%% Please head to {C=0xFF016295/}Windia Plains{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and kill those {C=0xFF016295/}Ash Wolves{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Please go to {C=0xFF016295/}South Windia Plains{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and aid in the effort of killing those pesky Ash Wolves.
Thank you! The {C=0xFF016295/}Ash Wolves{C=0xFF4D0D08/} should be prowling near the end of South Windia Plains. We're all counting on you.
Amazing! I'm so touched.
Still short of a few.
Please hurry up.
You're still here? Please hurry.
Oh no.How could you lose the flowers? These are for tomorrow but since you've lost them I'll give you these instead. I'm counting on you.
What's the matter?
What's the matter?
Please take care of this matter.
Thank you!
Please hurry.
Pet Delivery
How can I help you?
I have your lost Pet Box right here. Look like you didn't keep it in a safe place after all. Here you go. Take good care of it this time.
Is something wrong?
Oh! The pet is finally here eh? I guess this ought to cheer me up!%% Here, this is for your troubles. Thank you for delivering this.
What's the matter?
Pet delivery to Pamela

She's not her usual self these days... Then again, what kind of a parent would send all her children out in this harsh world?%% Her eldest son is at the Port of the Winds while her youngest is near the Fungoid Village.%% She's aged so much missing her children. That's probably the reason why she's asking for a pet.%% If it's not too much of a bother, do you think you can give this pet to Pamela in Odelia?
If it's not too much of a bother, do you think you can give this pet to Pamela in Odelia?

You're a great person to agree to such favour on a whim.%% Pamela lives at the neighbouring village, Odelia. Give this sack to her. The pet's in the sack, so please be careful during transport. Thank you!
Please reconsider.
Thank you!
What's the matter?
Bag is already full.
Hurry up please.
Are we going yet?
What kind of help do you need?
You caught them all already? I knew you were something!
Can you help us clear the Crabbies?
Do you need help?
Amazing! Did you get them all already?
I'm sure you'll be a big help. Please hurry.
You need anything from me?
Hohoho.Come for a pint aye?
I beseech you, please take care of this.
Thank you.
What's the matter?
Please hurry up.
Why are you still here? Please hurry up.
Meet Blacksmith Davy with the introduction letter to retrieve the lord's sword.
You can find Woodies at Bearded Whale Coast.
You need to dispatch 12 Raccoons and 12 Pinkertons.
How about this time you slay both Pinkertons and Raccoons? Let's see if you can get 10 each. I'm sure you can do it.
Knight Promotion
Promote to Knight?
Accept the Knight title?
Class Promotion
%name%, you have completed the class promotion. Congratulations!
Gladiator Promotion
Promote to Gladiator?
Accept the Gladiator title?
Level 20 Attained
Monk Promotion
Do you wish to promote to Battlemage?
Do you wish to accept the Monk title?
Battlemage Promotion
Do you wish to promote to Battlemage?
Do you wish to accept the Battlemage title?
Pathfinder Promotion
Do you wish promote to Pathfinder?
Do you wish to accept the Pathfinder title?
Arbalist Promotion
Do you wish to promote to Arbalist?
Do you wish to accept the Arbalist title?
Assassin Promotion
Do you wish to promote to Assassin?
Do you wish to accept the Assassin title?
Jester Promotion
Do you wish to promote to Jester?
Do you wish to accept the Jester title?
What? You haven't delivered my message? Please hurry up before anyone signs up for the contract?
What's the matter?
Did James say that? But I've already decided to go somewhere else. I need to talk to him. Thanks for the message anyway.
James's Errand

Some time ago, Florane came to me looking for a house, so I gave her a tour of the available houses.%% While we were making our rounds, there was this one house that caught her attention. She really likes it, but someone already made an offer on that house%% Guess what? That person withdrew the offer just today.%% I'm supposed to tell Florane about the good news but I'm otherwise engaged at the moment so I can't leave.%% Can you deliver the good news to Florane on my behalf?
As you can see, I am extremely busy. Could you please deliver the message to Florane at the soonest possible time?
Thank you very much.%% Florane's probably at the Inn which is not that far from here. I'll be counting on you.
Really?%% I guess I need to ask someone else for the job. But if you change your mind, just let me know.
Thank you very much.
Your bag is full. Free up some space before proceeding with a quest.
Huh? When did you arrive?%%Do you have any clue as to what's going on? Violent Woodsmen chopped down my trees for no good reason at all!%% Can you take care of them?
Not done yet? Hunt them down. I'll be waiting.
I heard the news that you wiped them out? Thank you very much. Because of you, we won't see them around here for a while that's for sure.
What happened?
Great job! You really wiped them out! Because of you ,we won't see them around here for a while.%% Here is your reward. Thank you and good bye.
We have cargo that needs to be dispatched today. Could you do me this favour? It's not much of a burden, I promise.
When did you arrive? Did you make the delivery?
Where did you say my cargo was again?
You'll deliver the second lot of cargo, right?
You look exhausted. Are you sure you're okay?
So, will you get me the hard leather?%% If you do me this small favour, I'll give you a fine crafted leather armour as well!
Welcome, do you have the Tough Sheepskin?
What's the matter?
Do you have everything already?
I'd appreciate it if you could hurry up.
Those {C=0xFF016295/}Stumpies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} would be the death of us.
Public Enemy: Woodies
When did you arrive? What happened to the Woodies?
I worry about the monster attacks that happened lately.%% I want to collect more food but I can't leave knowing that no one would mind them.%% Could you help me gather the food for the children?
Great, you're here! Did you gather the goods for the children?

Before I had any time to enjoy my streak of luck. A monster spotted me and I lost my Emerald while fleeing from it.%%*Sniff* *Sniff* Now I can't go look for it because I'm too afraid of the monsters lurking out there.%%I beg you, can you please help me?%%I'll reward you handsomely for your trouble.
Hello, do you have the Emerald?
Have you seen the Emerald?
You're back. How many monsters did you eliminate?
Is it really that hard? Could you please reconsider?
It's not just me, the rest of the townsfolk have been attacked as well. %class%, could you please get rid of the Blue Spectral Knights and Mummy Boxers at the Skippy Sanctuary?
Shark Deckhand
Shark Pirate
You're back! So, did you take care of those darn Ash Wolves?

This isn't funny! They crept stealthily down here and tried to break the door in. When they didn't manage to do that, they ate all the chickens instead!%% I beg you to get rid of those wolves in the vicinity!
Onward Dragon Fellowship! (1)
You haven't gone to {C=0xFF016295/}Port of the Winds{C=0xFF4D0D08/} yet?
Ah, I understand. But if you change your mind, just let me know.

Ah, you're the one they're talking about. The %class% who helps the villagers. I've heard about you from Oliver.%% What you're doing is so heroic for someone of your age. Hands down to you my friend!%% I'm sorry but could you give me a second and we'll talk again later?

Thanks. Here's a {C=0xFF016295/}Recommendation{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Show it to {C=0xFF016295/}Captain Colin in Port of the Winds{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% I'm sure you'll receive your due reward for contributing so much to the village. Please take care.

%class%, you're the one who helped out in the festival, right? Welcome!%% We pulled it off successfully thanks to you. We really appreciate what you've done. All we can do now is hope that the monsters will go away.%% I heard you are applying for the Dragon Fellowship, I'm sure that they'll pick you to join them.%% You should report to Colin in Port of the Winds. He's in charge of the Fellowship. I can write a recommendation for you if you want, I'm quite close to him. So, what do you think?

%class%, you're the one who helped out in the festival, right? Welcome!%% We pulled it off successfully thanks to you. We really appreciate what you've done. All we can do now is hope that the monsters will go away.%% I heard you are applying for the Dragon Fellowship, I'm sure that they'll pick you to join them.%% You should report to Colin in Port of the Winds. He's in charge of the Fellowship. I can write a recommendation for you if you want, I'm quite close to him. So, what do you think?
Are you? Did Dustin send you here? If so, let me see the recommendation. You have it, don't you?
Ah! This recommendation says that... You are the %class% who helped the folks in Odelia.%% I heard about your deeds from Dustin. You're here for the Fellowship eh? I respect your courage.%%

You're here for the training?%% You need to go through some heavy ordeals to prepare yourself. You must prove yourself to me if you want to be chosen as a member of the Dragon Fellowship.%% Are you up to it?

Alright then! Let's take it easy since I'm not sure about your skills yet.%%We're constantly receiving reports of monster attacks. Aid the soldiers in defeating {C=0xFF016295/}15 Starry Lolo{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I will be waiting for you.
Eh? When did you get here? So, did you manage to find the bait?
Huh? Why? Please reconsider. I need your help {C=0xFF016295/}%name%!{C=0xFF4D0D08/}!
You haven't left for {C=0xFF016295/}Bearded Whale Coast{C=0xFF4D0D08/} yet? I understand that you need to be totally prepared.
Yes! I knew you could do it! You must be weary, please rest up in your quarters.%% You'll need energy for the next mission. Dismissed!

{C=0xFF016295/}%name%!{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, while you're out taking care of Starry Lolo, our guards have received some urgent news.%% Our scouts spotted a Shark Deckhand heading off a small path near Bearded Whale Coast. He returned with a group of his accomplices!%% It's vital that we don't lose that area or else we'll be cut off from the outside!%% See if you can get in there and slay {C=0xFF016295/}15 Shark Pirates and Shark Deckhands{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
These monsters are much stronger than any Starry you've ever battled, so watch yourself. I'll cheer for you from behind!
I am Colin, the Guard Captain assigned to defend Port of the Winds!
Dragon Fellowship (2)
Ah, you changed your mind? Hmmm business is slow at the moment but you did pretty good anyway!%% Here's your reward, don't spend it all in one place!
Defeat Mummy Boxers
We need to slay {C=0xFF016295/}15 Blue Spectral Knightss and 15 Mummy Boxers{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at {C=0xFF016295/}Mirinae Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Report to Amy at Port of the Winds afterwards.
Plunger Raccoon
Pass James's message to Florane at Port of the Winds.
Deliver the pet to Pamela at Odelia.
Ash Wolf

You're a terrible thief! You're so clumsy and dimwitted!%% If you weren't recommended by Colin, I would've insisted you change your class to something else!%% In any case, I'll grant your class promotion!

You came for class promotion? Don't you think you need more experience prior to that? You must prove to me that you are worthy of a promotion!%% I heard tales of your chivalry among the villagers and I want to help you out unconditionally this time.%% Don't you feel honoured? Well, you should be! Don't thank me too much. Now you know why I'm so popular, haha!

Aren't you a Warrior? You came here for class promotion, didn't you?%% Too bad I would've liked to see you prove your worth, but you're already level 20.%% I have no choice but to allow your promotion unconditionally!

Greetings, I-I'm Edeline. You're here for Monk promotion, right?%% You have to prove yourself to me first by training and carrying out missions but I heard you helped the villagers from the monsters when they invaded the village.%% After much discussion with the High Sorcerers, we've decided to grant you a special promotion.
Congratulations! You've been promoted to Battlemage. %% Be proud of your job and help as many as you can.
Congratulations. You've been promoted to Monk. %% Be proud of your job and help as many people as you can.
Give Heidi the15 Leaflets that she needs for Potion brewing. Leaves can be found from Woodies at Windia Plains.
Welcome! Do you have the plungers that we requested?
Welcome! I sell weapons and it's okay to browse them! Come on in, hehe!
Everyone, listen! We're looking for monster slayers. If you wish to participate, please come and see me.
Do you need a loan? Getting a low interest loan is as quick and easy as shopping.
Attention everyone! We're organising the 'Legendary Warriors' festival to see who's the best among the rest! Report to me if you wish to participate.
No problem here! I'll be the guardian of Odelia!
Welcome, will you be staying overnight?
Welcome to the world of Dragonica! Follow the arrow shown on the screen that will take you to a portal.
Ouch, my back... It hurts a lot if I stand too long. Hey, you! Why don't you take my place for a while? I want to take a break.
We are the Superior Officers! For now we don't play any significant role in Dragonica but expect us in Closed Beta! Tough training awaits you!
Welcome to the world of Dragonica! Let me know if you want to shop.

Welcome! During the festival, warriors are tested to see who will emerge as the chosen one.%% The task is... to collect skulls in order to recreate the skull ornament of past legendary warriors! You've come to participate eh?%% You need to collect 12 Horns from the monsters you've slain. Are you up to the challenge?
Excellent! This is why you're a warrior!
Sorry.I thought you could do this.
Hey, this festival is for commemorating the great warriors of the past. Don't you feel honoured? Hurry up!

We have some work available for mages during the festival. We need to scribe the ancient papyrus which contains the work of old sages.%% To do this, young mages need to collect Sheepskins. How about it? Do you want to participate?
A decision worthy of wisdom and honour. Please take care of this.
A pity but if this is your decision...
You're not done yet? The festival will be held soon, please hurry.
This is fine leather. Thank you for a job well done.
Tough Leather
Give 20 Tough Leather to Edeline at Port of the Winds to scribe the ancient scrolls that hail the Legendary Warriors.
Legendary Warriors (3)

We used to transport only the necessary rations and equipment for efficient travel. This equipment is crafted using the best material possible, Sheep Horn.%% For the glory of the great hero thieves of the past, we're making water buckets made from special Sheep Horn. Will you help us in carrying out this tradition?
Geez! That was cold.
Good. I'll be expecting you. I strongly believe you can do it!
Can't you do it any faster? You sure you're a thief?
Wow, this is a top-notch quality horn! I can't believe you managed to acquire one in mint condition. Amazing!
Legendary Warriors (4)
Legendary Warriors (5)

Archers are required to possess utmost endurance in order to survive prolonged battles with the dragon. In this cold and dark terrain, warm clothing is an absolute necessity.%% As a tribute to the past great hunters for their perseverance, we will craft clothes from fleece. Will you help us out?
Of course you will! We'll expect good quality fleece.
But all the other archers are participating.Why shouldn't you?
You haven't collected them yet? You're kidding, right? Hurry up and go! This mission is of utmost importance.
Oh! Haven't seen good quality for quite some time now. You've done a good job!
Collect 20 fleeces and give them to Rony in order to craft warm clothes. This is an archer requirement to participate in the festival.
Sheep Horn
Collect Sheep Horn and give them to Cindy for producing liquid containers. This is a thief requirement to participate in the festival.
New Bandages
Raccoon Tail
Here it is... the lord's sword! I'm glad you came through for me.%% Please deliver this sword and take good care of it. Goodbye!

We're in big trouble! The children went on a picnic and {C=0xFF016295/}monsters from Skippy Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/} took them!%% We need to send scouts to track them! Can you help us look for the {C=0xFF016295/}traces of the children{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?
Thanks and god bless.
Hmmm.The children are frightened at this very moment.
You've returned already? We need you to patrol and search more thoroughly. This won't help!
You were such a big help, I'm glad you're safe. What you've done has helped us immensely in finding our children.%% But we still need to figure out what's going on. Please help us!
Assault on Skippy Sanctuary
Picnic Tragedy

Because of what happened at Skippy Sanctuary, the village is in chaos.%% Our scouts have information and we are rallying a force to save the children.%% To do that, we need new armour, weapons and skilled warriors. I don't think we can do it ourselves though.%% So I wrote a letter requesting back up to {C=0xFF016295/}Lord Steven Jr.{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Could you please deliver this letter to him?
Colin's Rage
You need to settle this quickly. Please hurry up.
You can't do it? What can we do then?
Oh, really? Nothing yet eh? Please hurry up!
You have returned! Hmm, I knew you could do it. Thank you!

After thorough preparation, we've decided to attack the monsters who abducted our children!%% First, we'll launch an assault at the nearby Bearded Whale Coast.%% For this attack to succeed, we need more people to help us.%% Can you go to {C=0xFF016295/}Skippy Sanctuary{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and slay {C=0xFF016295/}Lord of Night{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? At times like this, we need to have hope, courage and most of all inspiration!
Enter the {C=0xFF016295/}deepest part of Skippy Sanctuary (Mission Map){C=0xFF4D0D08/} and slay {C=0xFF016295/}Lord of Night{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! Godspeed.
Are you scared? You really disappoint me.
Why did you stop? We have high hopes for you. Try harder!
Oh, I heard all about you. You're a real warrior! I'll give you a big reward.
Vengeance on the Monsters!
Defeat Lord of Night (1 Star or more)
Investigate monsters at Bearded Whale Coast and Steven Trading Port.

Hey %class%, when did you arrive? I was looking for you. You're right on time!%% You've slain some {C=0xFF016295/}Woodies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} some time ago, right? I was happy about that and went for a walk but the other Woodlogs got real angry and brought {C=0xFF016295/}Stumpies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} this time. It's a big deal!%% Can you take care of them as well this time?
Thank you. If you slay {C=0xFF016295/}Stumpies{C=0xFF4D0D08/} this time I'm sure they won't come back.
What do you mean? You're the one responsible for this. What am I going to do with my farm? *Sniff* *Sniff*
You haven't taken care of the Stumpies yet? This farm is very important to me, it's been the family heirloom for years. Please take care of this quickly.
You're here. You took care of them? Praise the gods, thank you! I guess they won't come back again after what you've done. Thanks again.
Evan's Manuscript

You're running an errand for Colin? Ah, I've heard about you!%% Oh, the water! You need my signature.%% Thanks for your effort. Sorry I can't offer much help.%% Anyway, here's my signature. I'll be counting on you.
Starry Lolo

Hello! Do you like pets? Nowadays, people are more wary of anything that's not human because of the monsters.%% Thankfully, pets are still popular and they remain to be cute and comfortable companions.%% But my sister is thinking of closing down her business. It's a stupid move and I want to tell her not to...%% As you can see, I'm a little engaged right now. Can you deliver this letter for me?
Thank you! My sister is {C=0xFF016295/}Edith{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and she's in {C=0xFF016295/}Libra{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. You can't miss her because she looks pretty much like me.
Is the request too much? Well, there's nothing I can do but find another person to do the job.
Not yet? What are we going to do if my sister quits her job? Please hurry up!
Job well done! Now, everything seems to be the way it should be. I would pray for my sister and her business. Thank you!
Pet Sisters
Letter Delivery
Welcome! Did Amy send this letter? Ah, she doesn't like the idea of me closing down my business.%% I don't mean that but I guess she took it seriously. Hoho, sorry to bother you. Thanks anyway.
Talk to Guard Captain Dustin
Talk to Blacksmith Darwin
Aren't you finish with the job I asked you? Please hurry up!
Are you the one recommended by the Guard Captain? Thank you but could you wait until I finish this job?
Talk to Darwin
Why are you looking for me?
Report from 50 years ago

This world appears to be so peaceful but I'm having an ominous premonition... just like in the old days. I just can't sit here and do nothing. I need to warn everyone about this bad omen.%% Can you go to {C=0xFF016295/}Guard Captain Dustin{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for me and deliver this warning letter?
Thank you. Please deliver this letter to {C=0xFF016295/}Guard Captain Dustin{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
It's not that difficult. Please think carefully.
Please hurry. We have no time.
Meet Guard Captain Dustin
What's the matter? Did Alvin send this report? Okay, I'll take a look at it.

These ominous forebodings aren't sheer coincidence.%% Some time ago, a villager came to me with an old diary. Later on I found out that it was...%% It was {C=0xFF016295/}General Blood's Journal{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. The same person that brought blood and war to this land a long time ago.%% Isn't it surprising that he would keep a journal? Also, {C=0xFF016295/}Blacksmith Darwin{C=0xFF4D0D08/} found a mysterious memo.%% Why don't you go pay him a visit?
Thank you. {C=0xFF016295/}If you turn right from here, you'll see Blacksmith Darwin{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I'll be counting on you.
So it's a hassle? Well, that's okay. Goodbye.
You haven't left yet? Please do something about it and stop playing around.
General Blood's Journal
Ominous Memo

Not long ago, I was dismantling this old armour when I found this memo hidden in a small crack. I can't read it though because it's written in an old language, or perhaps a code.%% I asked my friend about it who happens to be a scholar and he told me that it belongs to {C=0xFF016295/}General Blood{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Aren't you curious about it? In any case, we can't just stand here and do nothing.%% I should inform {C=0xFF016295/}Guard Captain Dustin{C=0xFF4D0D08/} about this.
Here it is! Whew, the fact that the memo was owned by General Blood himself sends chill down my spine.%% At least I can get back to my smiting now! Thank you, please make sure he receives it.
What? Did guard captain send you? That is strange. Well, I understand. Goodbye.
I am extremely busy. Please wait until I'm done with this!

60 years ago, General Blood was the champion guardian of this continent. He took one of his maids under his wing, a beautiful and intelligent lady, groomed her and taught her everything.%% She was like a sponge, quickly absorbing all the magic spells she was taught.%% Then she learned black magic, with it she casted a spell onto herself that would bestow her with eternal beauty.
Well, I'll take a look at this.

She betrayed General Blood and left him. She went to a mysterious land faraway where no human could reach.%% She realized that in order for her plan of world domination to work, she needed the power of the Dragon.
Great! You're back. Let me see what you have...%% I see. This memo tells us something about General Blood. Thanks for your help.

Good job. This memo from Darwin is apparently related to {C=0xFF016295/}General Blood's Journal{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% This is a big problem. I feel uneasy with the way things are turning out... It's as if something bad is about to happen.%% Alvin possibly know how to decipher this diary. This could be a lead!%% Give this report along with the memo and diary to {C=0xFF016295/}Alvin{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. You can do that, right?
Thank you. The world's fate may perhaps rest in your hands.
Job well done! You've helped me a lot! What can I do for you in return?%% Anyway, how about you help Alvin instead of staying here? Please accept this reward and continue with your work.

Is this General Blood's Diary? Why is it here when it should be sealed and hidden away? I don't know why.But I will do my best to translate this. Please tell that to Dustin. Sorry to bother you with all these messenger errands.
You haven't made the delivery? Hurry up, I can't do anything about this matter.
Is that so? Then you shouldn't be involved with this case.
Meet Alvin

It's good that you came. We're now examining {C=0xFF016295/}General Blood's Journal {C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% That fool! He must've been dozing off while writing in this diary. It's a mess really! The diary's filled with ink. He must've spilled it or something. What an oaf.%% We need more time to translate and analyse the pages. First, we need to know the {C=0xFF016295/}composition of the ink{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in order to continue with our work.
Thank you very much. I'll continue working on this then.
Sorry, maybe I trusted you too much.
Hmmm... I'm in a hurry, could you please speed up?
Oh! Job well done!
Crying Over Spilt Ink
Poison Ink

After several tests in an attempt to remove the ink, we've concluded that it is composed of poison.%% According to the old records, in order to create a neutralizer, we need {C=0xFF016295/}Spider Poison{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Will you help us collect {C=0xFF016295/}Spider Poison{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?

Is this General Blood's Diary? Why is it here when it should be sealed and hidden away? I don't know why.But I will do my best to translate this. Please tell that to Dustin. Sorry to bother you with all these messenger errands.
Thanks! I will wait for you!
Hmmm.I don't know what to do... Well, I'll take care of it.
The ink is drying up too fast. We need more {C=0xFF016295/}Ink Neutralizer{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, hurry!
You've managed to collect the required materials? I've waited for this moment for so long! I guess work will go smoothly now. Thank you! I give you this as a reward.

I've finished producing the special {C=0xFF016295/}Ink Neutralizer{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% But I need someone to deliver this sample to {C=0xFF016295/}Alvin{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% I can't trust this fragile item to just anyone. Can you please deliver this?
Thank you! Give my regards to Alvin.
Ah, what a disappointment. I thought you would do the job.
Are you still here? You need to hurry up and deliver that.
Completion of Ink Neutralizer
Welcome back! I've heard a lot about you from Alvin. You should give special attention to this job since it's very important, alright? Why don't you give me that chemical first?

With my wisdom and the cooperation of others, the process of translating {C=0xFF016295/}General Blood's Journal{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is going smoothly. %% The journal doesn't look like it'll be intact until we're done with our research. It's way too old and may crumble any time.%% To be on the safe side, we must produce a copy of this journal. {C=0xFF016295/}Daisy{C=0xFF4D0D08/} knows a technique that makes it possible.%% Can you go on my behalf and deliver this letter of request?
Thank you! You can find Daisy in Advanced Windia Plains.
What a pity... We really needed your help.
Are you still here? You need to hurry up!
Antique Parchment

I'll be performing an old school technique to replicate the {C=0xFF016295/}Diary Page{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. This technique is so complex and I'll be needing several materials for it to work.%% Here's the list of the items, I can't collect them all myself so could you please help me?
Thank you! What I need are {C=0xFF016295/}15 Raccoon Hard Leather and Long Bat Tail{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I'll be waiting here for you. Please be careful.
What a pity.I thought you'd help us.
You haven't collected them all? We're running out of time.
These are the materials I need! Thank you very much, I know you've through a lot.
Spider Poison
Meet Alvin

I've successfully replicated the {C=0xFF016295/}Diary Page{C=0xFF4D0D08/} that Alvin requested. It was the first time I've ever used such a technique!%% Now, deliver this good news along with the diary to {C=0xFF016295/}Alvin{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Oh, Can you do me another favour? Can you deliver this to {C=0xFF016295/}Jeremy{C=0xFF4D0D08/} as well?
Thank you! This will surely bring joy to Alvin.
Is it that difficult? What a pity...
Alvin's waiting for this. Please hurry up and deliver it.
You're finally here! We appreciate all your help. Take this, it's my personal gift to you. You may need this one day.
Written Request Delivered to Daisy
You're running an errand for Alvin? Let me see the written request. Ah, it's you, alright. Nice to see someone like you put in so much effort for a good cause.

Oh, it's done! We've concluded the investigation on General Blood's Journal. Thanks to all the information you've collected throughout the land.%% The details of this diary are more chilling than we thought. General Blood was a man who hated peace and revelled in destruction and war. The Dragon War was his doing.%% This diary explains it. The world we live in now is not much different from the past. I'll inform Guard Captain Dustin. You need to tell {C=0xFF016295/}Lord Steven Jr. in Port of the Winds{C=0xFF4D0D08/} about this as well.%% Will you do that? This is an urgent matter!
I believe that we can overcome this crisis, thanks to you.%% I'm so tired, I need a rest.%% Please deliver this for me.
Alvin's Report Delivered
This is serious, could you reconsider?
What business do you have with me? Are you the one who's going to deliver this to Alvin?
Collect materials for Diary Page

Wow! An exact copy of the page! So this is how it would look like if I had this 50 years ago.%% Daisy's timid but her skills stand out when it comes to things like this. You did a good job. Thank you!
Completion of Diary Page

I've successfully replicated the {C=0xFF016295/}Diary Page{C=0xFF4D0D08/} that Alvin requested. It was the first time I've ever used such a technique!%% Now, deliver this good news along with the diary to {C=0xFF016295/}Alvin{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Oh, Can you do me another favour? Can you deliver this to {C=0xFF016295/}Jeremy{C=0xFF4D0D08/} as well?
Tough Raccoon Hide
Long Tail
Diary page delivery to Alvin

What is this report all about? What? Is this {C=0xFF016295/}General Blood's Journal{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? How did you manage to find such a rare item?%% Made by Alvin? Alvin... Yeah, Alvin! I'm familiar with him, we've met like 50 years ago.%% So this is from him... Anyway, General Blood's Diary is a dangerous item. If it falls in the wrong hands, it will bring about chaos.%% As long as you understand the consequences I know that you'll be careful with this.%% I'll give you a special reward for your service to this village.
Port of the Winds - Lord Steven Jr.
Hmm.You've collected good quality skulls. Job well done!

You want to help out with the festival or what?%% We've got this problem and I think you can help us. You know a lot of people are coming in for this festival, right?%% However, monsters like {C=0xFF016295/}Ash Wolves, Woodies and Spees{C=0xFF4D0D08/} are lurking around hindering the preparations.%% I'm wondering if you could slay {C=0xFF016295/}Ash Wolves, Woodies and Spees{C=0xFF4D0D08/} for us?%% The most populated area is at {C=0xFF016295/}Windia Plains{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Can you do that?
Thank you. I'll entrust the task of hunting {C=0xFF016295/}5 Ash Wolves, 7 Woodies and 5 Spees{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to you.
What a pity! But if that is the choice you made then I have nothing more to say.
Not done yet? Could you hurry up? Time is of the essence.
You cleaned up the village outskirts really well. Thanks for your effort.
Ash Wolf

This is your last assignment. Our guard was supposed to do it but I reckon that you're the better man for the job. I'll tell you what you need to do.%% We usually have an offering for the Warrior Festival. It is our tradition to offer the heart of the wildest beast that roam in the vicinity.%% We believe this animal is the {C=0xFF016295/}Vagabond{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, the enormous wolf that scares everyone in the village!%% That wolf is ferocious and dangerous. Can you get the heart of that wolf for us?

Oh, {C=0xFF016295/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! If you enter {C=0xFF016295/}Windia Plains{C=0xFF4D0D08/} you'll see the {C=0xFF016295/}Vagabond{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Slay him and bring us the{C=0xFF016295/}Vagabond's Heart{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! Finish the job and a big reward awaits for you.
Vagabond's Heart (Elite)
It's a shame that you couldn't do the job. It's tough, I understand. Goodbye then.
You haven't left yet? Well, since you're here, I'll give you a tip. That place is very dangerous, so when you go make sure that you are well prepared.

Oh, you brought me Vagabond's Heart! Amazing! This is the last item we need for the festival.%% Your cooperation and courage has helped us greatly. Thanks to you, the festival will be a huge success. I'll give this item to you as promised.
Guard Captain Colin's Survey

Slaying monsters around Bearded Whale Coast and Steven Trading Port brought peace to the village. But recently, monsters from the Sanctuaries started abducting people.%% I want to rally a force that will save them. Problem is, I don't know how many units we have in the village.%% Can you please help {C=0xFF016295/}count the number of men at Port of the Winds{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? This is a matter of utmost importance, I'm counting on you!
Please take care of this. You'll find those men if you walk around {C=0xFF016295/}Port of the Winds{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Is it really that difficult? I think you can do the job.
Well done! I want to reward you for this, please accept it.
Help Guard Captain Colin {C=0xFF016295/}count the number of men within Port of the Winds{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. This will help him greatly.
Counting the men at Port of the Winds.
Received conscription letter for Guard Captain Colin's Warrior Academy.
Obtain {C=0xFF016295/}Colin's Warrior Academy Notice{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and hand it over to the men of the village.

We want to train young men so they can defend the land in the future. Informing them of the recent happenings will fuel their passion but relaying the message has been difficult.%% Can you go around and send out these{C=0xFF016295/}notices to the young candidates{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? I think you would be less intimidating to them.
Thank you very much for taking this job.
This isn't that difficult.why can't you do it? Oh well.
We've got no time, could you hurry up?
Things are now rolling. Job well done. You deserve a reward, please accept this.
(Notice from Warrior Academy) Delivery

What're you here for? Oh, it's about the children who were kidnapped by the monsters at the Sanctuaries, isn't it?%% I want to participate. My friends were taken as well and I want to help them in any way possible.%%

Stop bothering me! I'm not going to do your annoying survey. On an unrelated note, do you know where the Dragon Fellowship keeps the treasure they find?%% I'm joining the Fellowship to find out... And maybe get my hands on some of it... Hehehe.%% Anyway you look quite strong. Why don't you accompany me?%% I'll do the survey for you in return.

Notice? What notice? I said I won't do it. You don't exactly mean it when you say that you want to participate.%% Let me tell you something, it's a secret but I'll tell you... The children who were abducted by the monsters are kept in a place where treasures are hidden. You look strong enough, why not work for me? Anyway, I'll think about this. If you go, I might go.
Welcome to the world of Dragonica! Enjoy your stay!
Shhh! This is a secret but I'll tell you.You'll find a portal in the deepest part of the Isle of Silence. If you go through that portal, something incredible will happen!
Hello, %class%! Nice weather, isn't it?
Who are you? You don't even know me so don't act all friendly.
You came back! What do you need? Don't give me anything useless this time.
You're here? What do you need this time?
Hmmm.This is a notice from the Warrior Academy. Of course I'll participate! I was waiting for a day like this. I'll train hard so I can slay monsters and save my friends.
You came with all the medallions?
Knight Promotion - Checkpoint (1)

Don't get cocky just because you have some potential! Here's your second test...%% Like I've said earlier, a worthy knight is not just about his combat prowess.%% Defence is important as well! A knight should be able to protect his comrades and receive minimal damage in battle.%% In that case, you must know your physical limitations, right? So... To test it, I want you to {C=0xFF016295/}go to Libra and find Blacksmith Anders{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Go train under {C=0xFF016295/}Anders{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and come back with the {C=0xFF016295/}[Revenge] manual, a powerful Knight skill{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. That's all I can tell you for now.
Yeah? You have no guts? No class promotion for you then. Goodbye.
Oh, it's you. So, did you meet Anders? What? You haven't met him yet? Why are you so slow? Hurry up!

Oh, it's you. Do you have the {C=0xFF016295/}[Revenge] manual{C=0xFF4D0D08/} from Anders? He doesn't hand them over to anyone easily.%% He must've really liked you. You got past this round faster than I thought! Good job!%% You passed the second test! Now, for your last mission, give me a moment.
Knight Promotion - Checkpoint (2)

You're here for my [Revenge] manual?%% Well, I heard about you from Evan. But I don't know anything about you so how can I give it to you?%% I also heard that you want to be a Knight. In order to obtain the [Revenge] manual, I want you to do me a favour. Can you collect 10 Coals, 10 Flame Rocks and 15 Lava Ingots for me? You'll get the[Revenge] manual in return.
Oh, you actually listened to what I said, good man! Here's a hint... The materials are located around boiling areas. Good luck then.
Did you say you didn't want to? That is unexpected. I'll inform Evan about this. Goodbye.
Not yet? Evan said you're someone reliable. I guess he gave you too much credit. If you think otherwise then you should do this job.

You got them all! I thought you can’t do it but I guess I was wrong. You’re actually good! Haha. Evan has a good eye for people.%% Now, I'll give you the [Revenge] manual as promised. Will you give me a moment?
Who are you? Why are you looking for me?
Who are you? Why are you looking for me? Ah, you're the one running errands for Evan and Colin!%% I heard about you from Evan. Well, I am glad to see you.
Slay Kunka (3 Stars or more)
The last test for the class promotion! Make your way into the Sanctuaries Mission Map (1 Star or more) and retrieve The Lord of Knight's gloves.

Here it is! This is the [Revenge] manual that you wanted. This is a really useful to project one's damage towards the opponent.%% However, you cannot use it until you become a full pledge Knight. You must go back to Evan and obtain approval for the class promotion. Farewell.
Second test for Gladiator promotion is to learn combat skills from a seasoned mercenary, Adelio.
Gladiator Promotion - Checkpoint (1)
Gladiator Promotion - Checkpoint (2)

You can call yourself a real Gladiator only when you have the knowledge and countless experience in battle.%% You need to seek out the well-experienced Adelio. Find him and learn one skill you need in combat!
You don't have it yet? What are you waiting for? Go on.
You don't have it yet? What are you waiting for? Go on.
You don't have it yet? What are you waiting for? Go on.

Oh, you came back with the [Revenge] manual. I heard it's hard to pry this scroll away from Adelio. I'm glad you did.%% Now, give me the scroll and I'll brief you about your final test. Do you need time to prepare? When you're ready, let me know.
Oh, it's you. So, did you meet Adelio?
Is that so? Looks like you did slay Hookah! Well done!%% You passed all the test for becoming a fearsome Gladiator! Congratulations!
I'll give you 15 minutes to complete the job, got it? You need to slay 15 Pumpkin Heads and 15 Broken Barrel Bones within 15 minutes.%% Clock is ticking. Why don't you get started? Hahaha!
What? Why'd you come here in the first place if you didn't want to do this? Are you kidding?
You don't have much time left. Are you sure you can complete this in time?

So, did you really slay all of them? I not sure if you notice but I was there tailing you to assess your combat skills.%% You're the best among all the warriors I've seen lately, good job! As promised, I'll give you the manual.
Meeting Adelio
Slay 15 Pumpkin Heads and 15 Broken Barrel Bones at Valid Raeth within 15 minutes to learn the combat skill from Adelio.
Here's your final task. Your mission is to go to Bearded Whale Coast or Steven Trading Port Mission Map and slay Captain Crabby.%% This is not a drill. Don't accept this task if you're not up for it.

With your calibre, I would've let you qualify already. But we have procedures to adhere.%% Don't forget to collect the marks from Crabbies when you slay them at Bearded Whale Coast or Steven Trading Port Mission Maps.
Are you scared? You shouldn't be! You want to be a Gladiator, right?.
Not yet? You need to hurry up. This test is not only for your sake but for the village as well.
First task to be a Monk is to get 10 Blazing Tail, 5 Blue Flame, and 5 Vayu Flame.
Broken Barrel Bones
Pumpkin Head
Gladiator Promotion - Checkpoint (3)

Hello! I'm Edeline and I coordinate magician promotions. You're here to be a Monk? You have much more to learn. Don't ask for hints or something because I won't give you any.%% Listen to me carefully and complete this test. Do you agree to do so?
Oh, when did you arrive? Are you done already?
Monk Promotion - Checkpoint (1)

You possess the qualities to be a Monk. In order to truly harness the powers of magic, you need to understand the true nature within it.%% Find Arcanist Pablo and get a scroll from him.%% What do you think? Do you want to do this?
Pablo is an experienced sorcerer. I've told him about you. I'm sure he'll teach you a thing or two.
That's unexpected. I can't promote you then.
You haven't spoken to Pablo? It's not nice to keep someone waiting. Hurry up and go.
You've returned with the [Wide Heal] magic scroll! You passed the second test as well. One more test and you're done. Good job!
Receive this.This scroll is called [Russian Roulette] and it deals a huge amount of damage to opponents. You cannot use this though unless you change your class to Gladiator.
You're on your own now. Make sure he gets it. Give my regards to Evan. Tell him to send me the reward I requested before!
Monk Promotion - Checkpoint (2)

{C=0xFF016295/}%name%!{C=0xFF4D0D08/} Edeline's told me all about you. You need to tap into your combat and magic knowledge to be a true master of magic.%% Now, you need to pass this task I'm going to give you. Only then will I give you one of my scrolls, agreed?

I won't be repeating this, so listen carefully. Here are the three things that I want you to collect:%% First item, a valuable object that can be sold at a high price. You'll find this in a place where young adventurers aspire to be warriors.%% Second item, the ugliest object in the underground lava area where the red dragon resides.%% Third item, a rod that you can find when you venture deep within the lava area.%% Oh yeah, just a reminder... You can only bring me one item at a time.%% You'll see my name engraved in all those items. I'm just making sure that you won't be handing over fake ones.%% I'll be waiting for you.
What? Why are you here then?
Is my test too hard? Hahaha, it's not that hard if you think about it.
You've completed it? Are you sure you didn't get any help? That's a surprise. Good, I'll give you the scroll.
Learn [Russian Roulette] in order to pass the second test. Go find Evan at Port of the Winds and give him this scroll.

Welcome back! Did Adelio gave you the [Russian Roulette]? Well, that's wonderful. He must have been impressed enough to give you the scroll.%% Hmmm, did Adelio tell you anything else? Anyway, job well done. You've passed the second test!
Monk Promotion - Checkpoint (3)
Oh it's you, did you make sure Evan got the scroll? You didn't go? How come? Don't you want to be promoted to a Gladiator?
Ah, you! Did you safely deliver the scroll to Evan?
Not done yet? Don't take too long or I cannot give you the approval for class promotion.
I am sure you have all the qualities of a Battlemage. You passed the first test.%% Take your time and relax first then let me know when you're ready. By that time, I'll give you the second test.
What's the matter?
You are {C=0xFF016295/}%name%!{C=0xFF4D0D08/} The one Edeline told me about, right? Welcome! You're seeking for advanced magician knowledge? Give me a second, I just have to finish something.
Battlemage Promotion - Checkpoint (1)
You have a potential but something's missing. Go find Arcanist Pablo, and get a scroll from him.%% You'll learn a lot of stuff while completing this test. So, do you want to do this?
Good, then find Pablo in Libra.
You don't want to do this? Oh dear, are you sure you want to give up?
Not done yet? Don't take too long or I cannot give you the approval for class promotion.
That's great! You have the scroll! You passed the second test. One more test and you're done. Talk to me in a bit.
%name%, report your progress to me.
You're back? Did you bring the certificate?

{C=0xFF016295/}%name%?{C=0xFF4D0D08/} Edeline's told me all about you. You've come for the magic scroll, right?%% Then prove to me that you deserve it. Battlemages require formidable physical and mental prowess to withstand the effects of powerful spells.%% Once you prove that you have those qualities, only then will I give you the magic scroll.
Really? Let's see then...%% Recently, Pumpkin Heads and Broken Barrel Bones are messing up the village.%% Go slay 15 of each in 15 minutes! Starting now!
No? I see that you're not that different from the other weaklings. Goodbye.
Your time's running out. Hurry up and go!
{C=0xFF016295/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, you did really well! You're the fastest one to achieve such a feat. Here's the magic scroll as promised.
Blazing Tail
Blue Flame
Vayu Flame
The last test is not a drill. It's more than a test actually because it has something to do with the safety of the village.%% Please enter Bearded Coast Mission Map and bring me Captain Crabby's leg.
Go inside the most difficult level of Bearded Whale Coast or Steven Trading Port Mission Map and defeat Captain Crabby.
Of course. I won't force you to endanger your life. We'll see.
Please hurry. Your promotion concerns our village peace as well.
Battlemage Promotion - Checkpoint (2)
Battlemage Promotion - Checkpoint (3)
Knight Promotion - Checkpoint (1): Speak to any Blacksmith and obtain [Revenge] manual
Ah, it's you. So, did you meet Anders?
Flame Rock
Lava Ingot
You have all the materials?

In order to obtain the [Revenge] manual, you need to gather a few materials. Collect 10 Coals, 10 Flame Rocks, and 15 Lava Ingots that can be found around Valid Raeth.%% Seek Anders at Libra when you're done.
Are you {C=0xFF016295/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, the one Edeline sent? Welcome! You wish to be under my Mage tutelage? I'm busy at the moment, please wait.
What do you mean you don't want to? You can't do that!
Learn [Revenge] in order to pass the second test. Find Evan at Port of the Winds with this scroll at hand.
Meeting Evan
So, did you safely deliver the [Revenge] manual?
You didn't go? How come? Do you want to complete the Knight training or not?
Speak to Pablo

The second promotion test is about collecting items with regards to the hints given: First item, {C=0xFF016295/}a valuable object that can be sold at a high price. You'll find this in a place where young adventurers aspire to be warriors{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Second item, {C=0xFF016295/}the ugliest object in the underground lava area where the red dragon resides{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Third item, {C=0xFF016295/}a rod that you can find when you venture deep within the lava area{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%%
1st Hint
2nd Hint
3rd Hint
Here it is! This [Wide Heal] spell can heal everyone in your party! Very useful for battles.%% You're lucky to have this scroll as a reward for such an easy test.
Meeting Edeline
Learn [Wide Heal] in order to pass the second test. Bring the scroll to Edeline at Port of the Winds.
Do you need anything from me? Did you find Edeline?
You haven't gone yet? How come? Don't you want to be promoted to a Monk?
{C=0xFF016295/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, report your progress.
Slay Kunka (3 Stars or more)
Last checkpoint for the promotion. Enter Traitor's Ridge Mission Map (3 Stars or more) and slay Kunka!
The objective of the second test is to find Arcanist Pablo and obtain a magic scroll from him.
The objective of the second test is to find Arcanist Pablo and obtain a magic scroll from him.
Slay 15 Broken Barrel Bones and 15 Pumpkin Heads at Valid Raeth within 15 minutes, so that Pablo will give you the scroll.
Here it is! This [Tornado] magic scroll can send all your opponents flying into the air!%% You're lucky to have this scroll as a reward for such an easy test.
You cannot use this magic scroll unless you're a Battlemage, remember that. Why don't you give it to Edeline first?%% I'll see you later, {C=0xFF016295/}%name%{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Goodbye.
You can't be promoted yet. Give this to Adeline first.%% I'll see you later.
Learn [Tornado] in order to pass the second test. Bring this magic scroll to Edeline at Port of the Winds.
You have the [Tornado] magic scroll! Wonderful! You've passed the second test. One last test remaining. Good job!
Looks like you did slay Hookah. Congratulations! You deserve to be a Battlemage!
Mysterious Gloves
Thank you! You're the best! Anders is in {C=0xFF016295/}Libra{C=0xFF4D0D08/} which is really nearby. Make sure he gets it and let me know.
Oh no.I cannot trust you!
You haven't left yet? Please be responsible and finish the job quickly.
Thank you. Job well done! I'm sure you won't mind if I reward you for this. Please accept this. I'll get the armour later. Thanks for everything!

You have a suspicious piece of armour for me? Give it to me! Hmmm...%% {C=0xFF016295/}My love... I'm so sick of living peacefully with the humans..... I cannot take it anymore... I wish for destruction and war... Having you was the most wonderful thing in my life... Always... Blood{C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% I guess this is a letter from General Blood sent to someone he loved. Interesting... I need to study this. Thank you! If you happen to find more, just hand them over to me!
Mysterious Gloves

Ah, you're that %class% who delivered these gauntlets to me the last time. They're from Turner, is that right?%% Oh my god, this armour belongs to that notorious General Blood, I'm sure. And it's heavily cursed with magic. Sorry, I can't help you on this.%% Give this to Colin. Please tell him that I need help in order to do something about this.
Please be careful of those gloves, There's something sinister about them.
All I ask for is a pair of gloves, and you refused! You're too much!

You haven't completed the task? I want to wear that wig before the weather gets really cold... Could you hurry up?

This is it... This is the wig I'm talking about! I want to try it out first to see if it looks good on me. I don't want people laughing at me just because I look stupid or something.%% So, how does it look?%% Hahaha, thanks for bringing joy to an old man like me.

Meeting Colin
I'm glad you delivered it.You should be careful since you touched it too.%% Thank you for doing this. Please be careful.
Welcome to the world of Dragonica! This place is the training ground. Get your game on before starting the real adventure. Enjoy your stay!
You can move to the direction that you want to go by pressing the {C=0xFF016295/}Arrow Keys (Left, Right, Up and Down){C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
To perform {C=0xFF016295/}Dash{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, {C=0xFF016295/}quickly hit the arrow key twice in the direction that you want to go{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Oh, yeah? You! You're doing a good job! I'll buy you delicious potions when we meet again.
You can {C=0xFF016295/}Jump{C=0xFF4D0D08/} by pressing C key. Go ahead and get on top of these obstacles by jumping!
Hey! Curious about the {C=0xFF016295/}Jump Platform{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? Go ahead and try it. Jump on top of it and see what happens.You'll love it!
If you want to climb {C=0xFF016295/}Ladders{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, get close to it and press the {C=0xFF016295/}Up Arrow Key{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
{C=0xFF016295/}X is the attack key!{C=0xFF4D0D08/} {C=0xFF016295/}Press X key repeatedly to chain a combo when attacking monsters{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
This tip will help you perform an air combo: {C=0xFF016295/}Press the attack and up arrow key to launch the monster in the air then jump towards its direction and start attacking.{C=0xFF4D0D08/}
Timing is important! When the monster is launched in the air, you must {C=0xFF016295/}jump towards its direction and start attacking{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! It's really easy so keep trying.
You need to pass this in order to become the best warrior.

Now that you've mastered the basics, let's get into the game! Your final checkpoint is the portal, you can reach it by using the jump platform.%% Press {C=0xFF016295/}Z key{C=0xFF4D0D08/} once you're there. I'll be seeing you later!
You'll be able to jump farther by doing{C=0xFF016295/}Dash Jump{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. This can be very useful in combat but requires much practice to master!
This is where you learn how to fight. {C=0xFF016295/}Attack the monster in front of you by using the X key{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! Go ahead.
A magician using a variety of spells instead of just ordinary attacks is more effective!
You can launch monsters in the air by hitting Z key. At the same time, you can jump and hit X repeatedly to chain a combo!
You can stun monsters while {C=0xFF016295/}holding down X key when attacking{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
You can perform a strong charge attack by holding down {C=0xFF016295/}Z key{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
If you hit {C=0xFF016295/}Z key{C=0xFF4D0D08/} at the portal, you will enter {C=0xFF016295/}Honour's Path in Odelia!{C=0xFF4D0D08/}
All is well! You can talk to me if you wish to know about the {C=0xFFFFFF11/}Game Functions{C=0xFFFFFFFF/}. I'll do my best!!
You can open the {C=0xFFFFFF11/}Inventory Window{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} by pressing {C=0xFFFFFF11/}I key{C=0xFFFFFFFF/}. To equip any {C=0xFFFFFF11/}weapon or armour{C=0xFFFFFFFF/}, just double-click on it.
You can view the whole continent and your current location by opening the map. Press {C=0xFFFFFF11/}M key{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} to open the map.
You can view {C=0xFFFFFF11/}Quest Information{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} by pressing {C=0xFFFFFF11/}L key{C=0xFFFFFFFF/}.
If you want to meet other adventurers who have chosen different paths, you must go out to Traitor's Ridge! Where is it? Press {C=0xFFFFFF11/}M key{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} for the answer!
Can you see the {C=0xFFFFFF11/}Exclamation Marks?{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} Press {C=0xFFFFFF11/}Space Bar or Left Click{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} the NPCs to talk to them.
If you hit {C=0xFFFFFF11/}Z key{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} at the portal, you'll be teleported to {C=0xFFFFFF11/}Odelia.{C=0xFFFFFFFF/}.
If you hit {C=0xFFFFFF11/}Z key{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} at the portal, you'll be teleported to {C=0xFFFFFF11/}Archer's Range in Odelia.{C=0xFFFFFFFF/}.
If you hit {C=0xFFFFFF11/}Z key{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} at the portal, you'll be teleported to {C=0xFFFFFF11/}Archer's Range in Odelia.{C=0xFFFFFFFF/}.

You can open the {C=0xFFFFFF11/}Skill Window{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} by pressing {C=0xFFFFFF11/}K key{C=0xFFFFFFFF/}. Select the skill that you want to use then {C=0xFFFFFF11/}drag it to the quickslot bar{C=0xFFFFFFFF/}.
You can view {C=0xFFFFFF11/}Character Level, Class and Abilities{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} information by hitting {C=0xFFFFFF11/}U key{C=0xFFFFFFFF/}!
Press {C=0xFFFFFF11/}N key{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} to open up the {C=0xFFFFFF11/}Extended Mini-Map{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} to see your current location and your surroundings.
Talk to Blacksmith Anders
What are these? Gauntlets?%% Did Turner sent this for inspection? He will be duly rewarded. Sure, I'll inspect it. You can go now, bye!

Hello there! I see this is your first time here! Welcome to {C=0xFF016295/}Odelia {C=0xFF4D0D08/}. So.. why did you visit us, anyway??%% Ah- You're here to join the {C=0xFF016295/}Dragon Fellowship{C=0xFF4D0D08/}?%% You know that there was a huge war between Humans and Dragons about 50 years ago, don't you?%% The war was over after the Dark Lord Elga and General Blood were 'sealed' into the 'Shadow Cabinet', but recently, Elga has been released!!%% So the Continent of the Wind is now in big trouble. As you can see, monsters are rushed into Odelia. %% So, to save our continent, we gathered an elite group of heroes and made the Dragon Fellowship. You...you didn't want to join the Fellowship, did you? With that...weak body of yours???%% To join, you have to meet Captain Colin in Port of the Winds, and here, you have to get Dustin's recommendation letter!%% This means only a selected few get to enlist.%% Ah. Sorry for making such a long speech. But...%% You seem like you've traveled far to get here, so why don't you take a load off your mind, and feet, and relax in the Inn of our town for a while?

Yes, that is a good idea. If you go to your right, you'll be able to find the inn. I'll introduce you to {C=0xFF016295/}Innkeeper Florence{C=0xFF4D0D08/} so you can stay there and relax for a while.%% {C=0xFF016295/}Press N and use the mouse cursor to find Florence.{C=0xFF4D0D08/}
Is that so? If you want to, I can't really stop you! I wish you a good trip then!

Oh, did you forget what I said? Head to your right and you'll see the {C=0xFF016295/}Inn{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. {C=0xFF4D0D08/}Innkeeper Florence{C=0xFF4D0D08/} should be there.%% If {C=0xFF016295/}you press L, you can check Quest Information.{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Have a nice day.

Welcome! Ah, you must be the %class% that Oliver mentioned. Yes, I've heard about you from Oliver.%% It's still too dangerous outside, so stay in our village for a little while. You must've been through a lot, you look like a wreck!%% You seem hungry so this should help... Oh yeah!%% I remember hearing that you want to apply for the {C=0xFF016295/}Dragon Fellowship{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. I heard that only an elite few will be selected though...%% An easy way I can think of is obtaining a recommendation from the Guard Captain.%% You know what, how about proving yourself to {C=0xFF016295/}Dustin{C=0xFF4D0D08/} since he's looking for help?%% If you go back from where you came, you can find a man named {C=0xFF016295/}Dustin{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Go ahead and see what he says.

=====Tutorial Quest=====
The basics of combat

Hey wait a minute. Yes, you!%% Where are you going? That's the way to Odelia. Don't tell me you are going to apply for the {C=0xFF016295/}Dragon Fellowship{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% What? You are? To vanquish {C=0xFF016295/}Elga{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? Well, there were many novices before you who tried their luck at joining the Fellowship.%%Unfortunately, some of them got injured along the way. Those were the lucky ones, so to speak. Some got lost on their way to the forest and haven't been found ever since.%% I deem it my personal responsibility to prevent this from happening. I want to teach you the {C=0xFF016295/}Basic Combat Skills{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. So, interested?

You should be honoured learning from me! Let's get started.%% I see you know how to move already. Can you go to the {C=0xFF016295/}Right Side{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? You have to press the {C=0xFF016295/}Right Arrow Key{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Right, you didn't have any trouble with that! Try tapping the {C=0xFF016295/}Right Arrow Key{C=0xFF4D0D08/} twice quickly. You'll be able to dash.

Very good! How about this? Can you do this?%% Press the {C=0xFF016295/}Jump Key during the dash{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! Press the {C=0xFF016295/}Right Arrow Key twice quickly{C=0xFF4D0D08/} then press {C=0xFF016295/}C{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
Excellent! You pick up faster than any other %class% I've seen!
Don't want to? Fine then, I don't care if you live or die!

This is all I can teach you! I can't say you're the best, but still you're much better than the other %class%!%% It's not easy to be selected in the {C=0xFF016295/}Dragon Fellowship{C=0xFF4D0D08/} when you only know the basic skills.%% ...eh? What's that sound? ...from your stomach? Tut, tut...%% Don't forget to eat regularly if you want to join the {C=0xFF016295/}Dragon Fellowship{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Take this!%% By the way, do you see the portal? Press {C=0xFF016295/}Z when you're on the portal{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and you will be teleported to {C=0xFF016295/}Odelia{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Talk to the townsfolk for advice about the Fellowship.%% Please take this {C=0xFF016295/}Odelia Return Scroll{C=0xFF4D0D08/}. Use this if ever you're in a tight situation. It'll bring you back to {C=0xFF016295/}Odelia{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% {C=0xFF016295/}You can purchase this scroll from the shop{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%% Alright! {C=0xFF016295/}Select one of the scrolls and confirm your choice.{C=0xFF4D0D08/}
Step on the giant flower to {C=0xFF016295/}Jump Up{C=0xFF4400BB/}. Try to jump on the tree.
Good job! How was it? Isn't it interesting?

Do you see the ladder? You'll be seeing a lot more of that in the future.%% Approach the ladder and press the {C=0xFF016295/}Up Arrow Key{C=0xFF4400BB/} to climb the ladder.%% Once up there, you'll see a few obstacles. Navigate across these by using {C=0xFF016295/}Jump and Dash Jump {C=0xFF4400BB/}.%% You'll reset if you fall off the stumps, so be careful.
Very nice! I don't have to explain how to {C=0xFF016295/}Move and Jump{C=0xFF4400BB/} anymore.

I'm not done yet! Let me teach you the most important combat skill. {C=0xFF016295/}X{C=0xFF4D0D08/} is your basic attack!%% If you {C=0xFF016295/}press X rapidly, you'll be able to perform a combo{C=0xFF4D0D08/}!%% Try it out on these monsters. Just move on when you're done practicing.
{C=0xFF016295/}X is the attack key{C=0xFF4400BB/}. If you hit it continuously, you can perform combo attacks! Try to attack them and {C=0xFF016295/}press X rapidly{C=0xFF4400BB/}.
When monsters die, they drop random items. How do you loot them? Just {C=0xFF016295/}press the Space Bar{C=0xFF4400BB/}.

We are going to learn how to utilize {C=0xFF016295/}Skills{C=0xFF4400BB/} now. Do you see the {C=0xFF016295/}Quickslot Bar{C=0xFF4400BB/}?%% Hit {C=0xFF016295/}K to open the Skill Window{C=0xFF4400BB/}, then drag some active skill icons onto your Quickslot Bar to use them!%% Now try attacking some Woodies by hitting {C=0xFF016295/}Q{C=0xFF4400BB/}!
Okay, good! Do you see the Hyper Jump? Try to reach the top like you did with the giant flower last time.
Hahaha! How was it? It's more exciting than before, right? Alright, let's keep moving to the left.

{C=0xFF016295/}Combos{C=0xFF4400BB/} are successful chain attacks that yield bonuses! As you increase {C=0xFF016295/}the number of combos{C=0xFF4400BB/}, your EXP gain will increase as well!%% Well, since this is just a tutorial, the EXP bonus won't register.
You can only use one skill now, but as you level up, you'll learn more skills! Aren't you excited? Don't you want to level up as soon as possible?

Can you see the big tree? You still remember {C=0xFF016295/}Dash Jump and Jump{C=0xFF4400BB/}?%% Get atop this tree by jumping. {C=0xFF016295/}Hit C when you see the tree to reach the top.{C=0xFF4400BB/}
Awesome! You're not a novice now, hahaha.
Alright! Try not to fall off and {C=0xFF016295/}Jump while dashing{C=0xFF4400BB/} at the same time!
{C=0xFF016295/}After holding down Z for a while{C=0xFF4400BB/}, release the button to {C=0xFF016295/}launch monsters up with a charged attack!{C=0xFF4400BB/}

After holding down Z and releasing it at monsters, you can {C=0xFF016295/}launch them into the air{C=0xFF4400BB/}!%% Try to {C=0xFF016295/}Jump while the monsters are in the air{C=0xFF4400BB/} then press {C=0xFF016295/}X three times{C=0xFF4400BB/}, to execute a powerful air combo attack!
Try a combo attack with {C=0xFF016295/}X + X + Up X{C=0xFF4400BB/}! You can set monsters up for an air combo with this pattern! When you're in the air, attack the monster by pressing X.
{C=0xFF016295/}After holding down Z and releasing it toward the monsters{C=0xFF4400BB/}, you'll {C=0xFF016295/}blast the enemy with a powerful attack{C=0xFF4400BB/}!
Upon launching monsters in the air, you can {C=0xFF016295/}Jump{C=0xFF4400BB/} and {C=0xFF016295/}hit 'X' rapidly{C=0xFF4400BB/}, to execute various air attacks.

This is unbelievable... I tore the book while decoding it...%% I guess I'm getting too old for this. (Actually, I used to do this a lot when I was younger too.) What I need is firstly, 20 Shadow Papers. And what else is there...%% Ah, right! I need 5 Sticky Fluids so I can put this torn-up papers together.%% I'll be waiting, so please get them for me.
I know the world changes so fast, but I didn't expect a youngster to turn down an old man's request.
You got them all? No? I'll be waiting, please hurry.
Oh... You got it all, let me see.%% Good, good, that's it. Hmmm...%% Thank you young man, you've done well.

Now we embark on the Warrior Academy's first phase of combat training. In order to be a warrior, you need to have basic combat skills.%% Without the basics, you'll not be able to learn anything. We knew you could do it. But that's not all. A good warrior doesn't just rely on combat skills.%% A good warrior should be excellent at attack and defence, ready for close combat anytime. A person named Farrell

He wasn't just an avid practitioner of medicine but was very interested in engineering.%% You know the Shinestone vending machine over there? He built that. Report to Colin
Investigation on Farrell's Mansion

I have the result, finally. Forensics has given me the answer I've long suspected: Farrell!%% His blood type, finger prints, everything matches!%% That mad scientist... what in the world...%% Forensics Captain Redsome told me that Farrell was capturing monsters in order to extract their soul and fuse them with his body, in order to create an abomination of some sort.%% The dead monsters disposed along the coast were victims of his experiments! At this rate, the villagers may not be safe as well.%% We can't let him do this... Please go and investigate Farrell's Mansion now. I will try to gather more people to help us...%% Your job is to get Farrell's attention while I gather a strike force.
If he can use dangerous beasts as guinea pigs, he's obviously powerful. Be careful %name%.
I thought you were the one for the job, what a pity... You really can't do it?
Farrell's mansion is not that far from here. Examine the map if you're lost.
Been to Farrell's Mansion? How did it go?

The door was locked? This is a problem... With his technical knowledge, unlocking that door won't be easy.%% It's time for us to obtain advice from Jeremy, the resident wise man, %name%!! He doesn't look the part, but I can assure you that he's a walking library.%% I would know because he was my mentor when I was younger. Find him, and let him know of our trouble!
I thought you were the one for the job, what a pity... You really can't do it?
We need to prevent Farrell's experiments!
You tried to enter Farrell's Laboratory?
Meeting Jeremy
Master Key (1)

How can I help you? Ah... Farrell's mansion door is locked?%% That door was made by one of the most renowned door smiths in the world. It can only be opened by a master key, if you don't have the original.%% Hm... that reminds me. There are many unique and beautiful treasures even we don't know of. And there are treasure hunters as well...%% A few years ago... a horde of pirates stormed this harbour.%%They didn't come to mess the port up though... They were here to buy a master key.%% Why the Port of the Winds, you may ask. Because the only person in Elyades who can smith master keys lives here...
Sure, good idea. Don't overdo it though.
If you gather all pieces of the key, I can meld the key pieces for you. Just be careful when you enter that place...

This isn't good, the pirates are messing up the coast! Why would they do that?!%% Anyway... the key I saw was split into 4 pieces... you need to match those 4 pieces together to create the master key.%% It won't be easy finding the scattered pieces though...
Welcome back. I just came back from a meeting with Forensics Captain Redsome.%% Good job... let me see the map! Could you wait for a second? There's something else I need you to do.
Oh... These are the shattered pieces of the master key... You want me to remould it right?%% Give them to me... This won't be hard... wait a moment, will you?
Here it is... This is the master key. I should give this key to Colin before you enter the mansion.
There's this strange, vicious air about the mansion... I'm not sure what it is...
You've got dirt over your face as well...
I'll be counting on you.
I thought you wanted the key made really bad, what do you mean you don't want it now?
The key to Farrell's Mansion? So this is the key I've heard about! Good job!!

Farrell's Key

I can't find out anything from these bodies!! We have to find out who did it! I need to talk to more townspeople around the port!%% Can you {C=0xFF016295/}go and talk to the villagers{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to find out what they know?

Welcome! I was wondering about you. It's not just the stench now. Now the forest creatures have all disappeared, and monsters have replaced them.%% And the coast has been taken over by pirates... Ah! You're from the special investigation team! You are just in time. Listen! Then it disappeared...%% And I was labelled a liar... You believe me, %class%, don't you?%% That monster looked like... it was enormous... Oh yeah! It looked like Frankenstein! Just like the childhood stories!
Well... I am not sure since my nose is blocked all the time... I don't know.%% Hmmm... I can see the black smoke nightly though... Maybe someone's playing a prank? Hahaha... So... Sorry.
I'll give you a list of five people to inquire. Ask any questions you can think of! That person could be our guy!
