-------------Additional Script from 15 Feb 2008 -------------
The Story about the Pop-up Book

In the past great wise men compiled their wisdom in the pop-up book. The pop-up book contains words of wisdom and peace, and attaining Nirvana.%% What we need now is a pop-up Book just like this. I need to consult Jeremy, the great wise man. I think that will lead us the monster that Farrell was investigating.%% Can you deliver my letter to Jeremy?
Thank you. Be safe on your trip. You know where Jeremy is, right?
Hmm... Is that so? Could you reconsider? This will also benefit you.
You haven't spoken to Jeremy yet?
You are really persistent, aren't you... So, what do you need this time?
Colin made a dangerous decision. There is no doubt that the tome possess great powers, but at the same time, power can be dangerous.%% But since it's his decision...
We appreciate your support.
I hate to travel too... but someone has to do this.
You haven't delivered the information about the pop-up book? You are so slow!
Cursed Tome (1)

I found an unusual book while fishing in an old wooden barrel *snort*. I think I can make some gold by selling it, but I've got this bad feeling about the book... *snort*%% I should ask someone what to do with this book... someone like Jeremy who knows a lot, don't you agree?%% I'll write a request to Jeremy, will you deliver it for me?
Then please take care of it. Be careful on your way. *snort*
Hmmm... should I just sell it...
No answer from Jeremy yet? I hate to wait, why don't you go and check it out? *snort*
You're back. Thank you. *snort* Jeremy sure knows everything!
Cursed Tome (2)

So... someone had this book... who was it? Primo, that fisherbear? Well, you never know what you can fish out of the water these days.%% This is the pop-up book that Colin mentioned before. It must not fall into the wrong hands. Can we trust you?
Sure, go to Primo and bring me the book.
I thought you were the one for the job, what a pity.
Secret Delivery Plan
Of course, this book is the famous cursed pop-up book! It would be nice to have it, but no... please deliver this book to Jeremy.
Please deliver this book safely to Jeremy.
Is there no one who can do this? I don't care, I'll just keep fishing.
You should go soon. The longer I keep this book, the more uneasy I feel.
So that is the book. Hand it over so I can study it.
New Book Cover
To undo the tome's curse, we need to create a new book cover with magical paper.%% We need someone who's capable and reliable to entrust this task to. Are you the one?
I'll be counting on you. Good luck.
So you're not the one after all...
The magic in this book is very powerful. People will suffer if we don't hurry.
You came back safely, job well done!
Jeremy says he needs a new cover made from magical paper to undo the vicious curse embedded in the pop-up book.
Measuring the Pop-Up Book's Power

The most effective way to measure the power of the book is to channel the power flow into the earth and see how badly effected the monsters will be.%% I've done the channelling bit, so why don't you battle the monsters to gauge their performances?
Thank you for your help.
You want me to fight them myself? So cold...
Come on, you can do better.
Well done! The magic has affected the creatures in some interesting ways. You might be under its effects as well. We should delve into this.
Jeremy has channelled the pop-up book's magic into the earth at the Sanctuaries. Battle the monsters to test their performance.
Waterproof Secret
There must be some magical component to this book's waterproof ability. Some special reason we don't know about. We'll need to consult a waterproofing professional.
I'll be on my deathbed soon if you keep me waiting.
Is it too hard for you to help me?
The book and I are going to turn to dust at the rate we're waiting.
Welcome back! We can get started on our research now!
The Pop-up Book doesn't get wet from liquids. Seek out Davy, the waterproofing professional for some answers.
Meeting Davy
Mass Production Request

The pop-up book's a big trend among the villagers recently. A tome containing the wisdom of ancients...%% By mass producing this book, we'll enhance the literacy rate of the villagers, and endow them with the knowledge to strengthen themselves!%% Spiffy idea eh? Let Jeremy know.
Thank you, I'll be counting on you to deliver my letter.
No one reads books nowadays... that won't help.
Jeremy hasn't replied? I can't wait all day, you know.
Oh, you did me a big favour. I wish to reward you!
Meeting Jeremy
Knowing that Jeremy is studying the Pop-up Book, Steven has requested that Jeremy mass-produce the text. Let Jeremy know of Steven's idea.
Mass Production Sample Delivery
Thanks to Steven Jr.'s endorsement, the sample is finally ready. Please bring the sample to me.
I'll be waiting. Please return safely with my sample.
You don't really like books, do you?
Why isn't the sample here yet? I'm dozing off...
Welcome back! I'll deliver this good news to Steven Jr.!

I'm longing for the day that all seven Precious Treasures are purified.

You are stronger than you look, but no matter, you are no match for my awesome power.
We are missing a spiritual stone! Everyone! Concentrate!
No.. With only four heroes, this is impossible!
Elga is fighting back! Everyone concentrate your attack on Elga's heart!
Now! Altogether! Strike!

This is strange for Hel Krouzer. He told me that he will not interfere with Humans.
You are too weak! You won't even get to Elga!%% Level up and come back, with your current skill level, no one will ask for your help! You'll just get in the way!

Go to Jundo, he is the leader of our Fellowship!%% If you wish to face Elga, listen to what he says.
When you are fighting Elga, remember to find and destroy his defences first.%% If you are too busy with avoiding his attacks, you will not able to defeat him at all!
After Elga flew into the air, most of our best soldiers were instantly killed by his attack. There has to be a way to avoid the attack.
Drakan can not ignore the Black Dragon Lord Elga anymore.
De...Devie Rich might be mmmmm... more scarier than Di..Diablick%% Wh..What am I t...talking about!

If I die here while fighting Elga...
Will you pass this message to Priest Syari. %% I.. I.. lov... Hmm.. Nothing! Just pretend I said nothing..
Oh, thank you! This is your reward!
Oh, %name%, you've slain them all! We are honoured!
Good job!! You responded really quickly!
Good job!! Please do your best for our continent
Thank you! I will never forget what you've done for me!
Oh, you caught them all? You are better than I thought. Here! Good job!
Thank you for avenging me! You were worth the money! Hoho!
Then give my shield to Darwin. I'll be counting on you.
{C=0xFF016295/}Hold down 'Z' and release it after charging it fully.{C=0xFF4D0D08/} You can use a {C=0xFF016295/}super charging attack{C=0xFF4D0D08/}!

{C=0xFF016295/}When you jump and hit 'X' while in the air, you can execute an air attack!{C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% Once you add skill points in the relevant skills, {C=0xFF016295/}you can execute air combos as well!{C=0xFF4D0D08/}
Welcome. You must be busy, hoho...
Hmm... There've been more monster attacks around the village recently... not that it's news.%% I've got a bad feeling this time though... I've got a sixth sense you know...
There is one portal that brings you to the darkest depths of Windia Plains. I heard that Vagabond they all talk about lives out there... You think it's true?%% %name%! Have you ever been there?
Have you been to Traitor's Ridge? It's scary out there. An army of monsters appear at the sound of a horn.%% You should be careful.
The Dragon Fellowship? I heard they're here to slay Elga!%% We're also looking for volunteers... I don't know any other details.%% You better go see Guard Captain Dustin if you want more information.
You're on your own once you set foot in Windia Plains. Doesn't hurt to be prepared.%% I have potions, equipment, return scrolls, anything you need!

Rumours that Elga was released spread like wildfire across the continent... It threw the entire population into a panic!%% On top of that, usually tame and docile critters started turning into violent, bloodthirsty monsters!
The Dragon Fellowship devotes itself to ridding Elga, the King of Darkness. Elga was sealed 50 years ago, but was recently released.

The next town after Odelia is Port of the Winds. It's a large harbour with spectacular views.%% There'll be soldiers recruiting hopefuls for the Dragon Fellowship. You'll need to traverse some rough areas before seeing the port though.
While monsters roam the outskirts of the village, the core horde lurks in the Mission Maps.%% I've heard stories of massive treasures hidden inside, hoho.
Have you heard? Some time ago, the Dragon Fellowship left the village, and they're gathering a second team now!
The Dragon Fellowship mobilized upon receiving news of Elga's appearance.%% Sheesh... I hope everyone is safe.
Those notorious pirates sank all our boats... I need to go back to my home... This is a disaster...
You see that big mansion? That mansion used to belong to the gentle Doctor Farrell...%% People say that only monsters reside there now. I've tried to sneak into the mansion once but I failed.
The port started developing rapidly after the Dragon War. Steven is a great leader. We hope that he will lead us through these dark times.
Dr. Farrell performed many good deeds when he was still sane... But we haven't seen him since he started obsessing over his research.
See those Superior Officers standing around the harbour? They can promote you if your level is 20 or higher.
There'll come a time when you need more advanced training. Why don't you approach the Superior Officers? You can get promoted when you reach level 20.

There are so many monsters around the harbour... According to some townsfolk, the particularly violent ones seem to crawl out from an opening located behind the harbour.%% That's why our guards constantly patrol that area. But since the departure of the Fellowship, we have barely enough to defend the town.
Do you see minimap at the top right hand corner? Hit N to enlarge it.
Welcome! There's no better way to travel than using a return scroll. Looks like you need one.
You want to strengthen your weapon? Return to me once you've collected Stardust.

Combat will be so much easier if you hotkey your skills. You know how to use the Quickslot, right?%% Hit K to bring out the skill tree window. Drag the skill icon to the Quickslot bar then you're good to go.
Welcome to Odelia. You're not prepared for the dangers outside this village.%% Healing potions and return scrolls can only be found in this village. Whilst stocks last!
You know where Windia Plains is, right? If you head over there, you'll be able to meet other adventurers.%% You might be able to make a quick buck off them! Oh, I've said too much already.
Welcome. If you wish to deposit any valuables, let me know. We charge only the most reasonable fees!
If you want to try some of my delicious dishes, then you need the recipe and ingredients, haha!
Lost your way? Hit N to find out where you're at.

Villagers with Yellow Exclamation Marks above their heads will offer you a quest.%% Those with Silver Exclamation Marks may not trust you yet.%% You need to establish your sincerity by slaying monsters or helping them out in other ways.
We need valiant warriors instilled with courage, wisdom, and uh... other heroic traits to combat the monsters!%% Just like the legendary warriors who led us to victory in the Dragon War!
Not anyone can enlist in the Dragon Fellowship... Amateurs don't stand a chance. Training hard is your only chance for survival.
If your bag is full, I'd be glad to take it off you for a fair price!
Hey, young man... you look familiar to me... have you seen me before? Maybe 50 years ago?
I want to train harder, so I can enlist in the Dragon Fellowship! I've never skipped a day of training!
I have a friend whose name is Sen. He's short and has blue hair. Have you seen him? I heard he's in town, but I can't find him anywhere. Hmmm.Where could he be?
I heard they're recruiting another Fellowship team. I should stow away secretly... I have a feeling they'll stumble upon a sea of treasures! Hoho.
I heard they're recruiting another Fellowship team. I should stow away secretly... I have a feeling they'll stumble upon a sea of treasures! Hoho.
Don't you want to test your physical and combat limits?
Anyone who's level 20 and above, come forth! I shall promote you! There's a promotion trial though!
You need to be at least level 20 if you wish to continue the path of the true thief. Only then will I show you the amazing array of skills I have!
Grasping the essence of magic is a hard and arduous journey.%% But once you understand the balance of magic and Man, your powers will increase immensely.
Hey, cutie! Hello! Come find me if you want to be a real bow expert!%% Not now! I mean when you reach level 20.
Those Shark Pirates have invaded our harbour too... this is getting worse! Hookah! You coward...! Taking advantage of our unprotected port after the Dragon Fellowship left!
Compete with the best in the PvP Arena! You can join the fight by clicking on 'PvP' at the bottom right.
Have you seen Amy, the lady who sells pets? Isn't she pretty? How can a person be so cute, nice, beautiful... It's almost unreal...
It's so hard to catch fish nowadays. All I fish up are rotten ones or decayed monster flesh! *snort*
Should I teach you to cook? You'll need to bring me the recipe and ingredients then! Then I'll teach you how to cook delicious dishes!
You look like a person going through a series of misfortunes... That's why you are here... too bad...
We lost contact with the Dragon Fellowship elite who were headed for the Drakos. This is not good...
Hey, have you heard about the Dragon Fellowship elite who were killed at the Drakos?!
Are you the famous %class%? I heard you are investigating the missing people at the Drakos, am I right?%% I don't know how strong you are... but you better be careful. You could die there.
I wish we had those legendary warriors who led us to victory in the Dragon War... They could save us...
I've been hearing inhuman growls around here recently. I think there're monsters abound!
So, you're all experienced now eh? Still look fresh off the novice boat to me.
Hmmm... we've been cut off!
I am Sigin, a scout from the Port of the Winds. I don't know how you came here, but you must be careful. Also, if you see Ryan, please let me know!
Hey you! It is way too dangerous here, you must leave. The monsters will start surfacing when it gets dark!
Wow! My shield's so much stronger with the enchant!!! Thank you very much! Just you wait, blasted wolves, we'll see who's boss!
Courage, wisdom and arcane laws. By the time you see it all as one, you will understand true magic.
Yes! Yes! Hit the {C=0xFF016295/}right arrow key{C=0xFF4D0D08/} to move forward!
What are you doing? Why aren't you advancing?
Hey! You! Do you know what you're supposed to do? Get over here! {C=0xFFFFFF11/}Get over here and hit the space bar{C=0xFFFFFFFF/}. Hurry up!
Sniff... Did you see the monsters below? They weren't here yesterday! What happened?
I've been on the roof staring at those monsters for so long that I'm not afraid of them anymore. I feel like... I want to be with them... feels so weird... why is that?
I came because I heard that many adventurers are here and I want to help them in any way possible. Let me know if you need anything. I'll offer my goods at a good price.
I heard the pirates assaulted the Bearded Whale Coast and Steven Trading Port! Have you been there?
%class%, you're here to join the Fellowship? Our harbour's bustling with adventurers who want a chance to join.

I think you can't do anything now... Why don't you think again?

=====05.21 (Event cut dialogue)=====
The party succeeds in entering the mansion and defeating the monstrous Farrell, the mad scientist who wants to destroy Port of the Winds.
The remains of dark experiments which mutated animals to horrid monsters are found all over the laboratory...
And a blueprint hinting some greater evil is found.
It was a blueprint for a monster that would be created from lava. Farrell's planning to create a dragon that would be able to destroy the world!
The party succeeded in putting a stop to Farrell’s path of destruction in the shore cities, but his secret plan forces the party to hunt down the monster made from lava.
After a long and arduous battle, the party finally defeats the lava dragon, Lavalon.
The party takes a drake scale from Lavalon. Knowing that it is the only way to track General Blood’s remains.
The party has decided that they need someone to help analyse the scale. They’ve heard that Magician Pablo is visiting Libra and decides to pay him a visit.
After some studying, Pablo tells the party that there is nothing more that can be known from the scale except that it was used in General Blood's armour piece.

Then as if by some realization, Pablo talks of a castle which only speaks the truth. He also gives the party a scroll containing the legend of this castle saying that this may somehow help on their journey.

Although the party obtained a scroll speaking of the castle of truth, they knew that they also needed more info. So they have decided to search for it. For a united goal!!! and for their own hidden agendas.......
How are you investing your money? You're going to get your own place right?%% How about viewing this MyHome that I manage?
You've heard of MyHome? I can give you some tips if you want to talk about getting your own place.

So this is the town that they call Odelia!%% Ah, you want to know about it? Help related dialogue
Welcome to the world of Dragonica! This is a place where you can learn some basic controls of the game. Have fun learning and enjoy the game afterwards!
Congratulations on a Level Up!
Every time your level increases, you receive 20 skill points. The character's most basic statistics, such as strength, dexterity, intelligence and health will increase as well as the HP/MP.
What is an expendable item?
Expendable items are items that can be used anytime instantly. You can use them by clicking it on the inventory.
Using Skills
Skills are highly effective attacks that cost MP. They will also cause certain conditions and reactions. Try different combos using the skills.
Learning Skills
The points that you earn after a level up can be used to learn new skills or strengthen the ones you already have. You can see more info by pressing K.
Skill Points
Skill Points help you learn new skills or strengthen existing ones. To get more skill points, level up through quests or by hunting monsters.
Easy Skill Use

Press K and place the mouse cursor over the icon to read the description. Do you see the alphabets on the quickslot bar at the bottom of the screen? Just drag the skills on it using the mouse. The skills will help you on your long and arduous journey.
Friend System

Friends can be registered by opening the Community Window. You can access it through the Menu Buttons on the lower right of the screen or by pressing Y. You can register your friends on the list and they can do the same for you.
Guild System
Guilds can be created by speaking to Dony. You need to be at least level 10 and possess 20 gold to form a guild. You can invite anyone to join your guild.
Party System

Parties can be formed by opening the Community Window. You can access it through the Menu Buttons on the lower right of the screen or by pressing Y. An alternative would be clicking on the character and inviting them through the pop up window.
Game Options
You can configure the game settings to optimize your gaming experience to match your PC specs. Option menu is found at the Menu buttons on the lower right of your screen.
About Control Keys
Control keys help you with everything in the game. Would you like to know what keys are used? Click the Menu button on the lower right of your screen and select Key Settings.
Control Keys Configuration

Are you not satisfied with the control key settings? Click the Menu button on the lower right of your screen and select Key Settings. You can switch them with your mouse and configure them to your preference.
How to play PvP?
To play PVP you must first click the PvP button on the lower right of your screen and enter the Waiting room. You can create you own room or join other user created rooms.
About Class Change

You can become a stronger hero by changing your class. Be very careful in your selection because once a class is chosen from the two class evolutions available for your character, you cannot choose or change to another.
Moving between maps
You should visit the town and talk to the people. But first you have to get there right? You see the round portal that goes to Odelia? Press the Z key once you're over it.
What's First?

Ah, so you've made it out to where all the monsters are eh? Well, don't worry about a thing because there aren't strong monsters here!%% So let's get you levelled up! Go ahead and hunt those monsters you see!
Jump Platform
If you want to travel fast to a far off place, use the flower shaped jump platform in front of you. You see the blinking light? That shows the direction in which you can jump towards.
New Areas
Welcome to a new combat area. There are stronger monsters here so be careful. A Mission Map is also available somewhere that allows you to enter a hidden area.
Mission Map
You've found the hidden area. There are stronger monsters here that may give you better items that you can't find in normal maps.
No more HP
Ah, how tragic. If you've been playing hard enough, you should have enough game money to be revived. If not, you'll start out from the last town you visited.
New mission
You have been given a new mission. Press L key to check out what it is!
To complete a mission
You've completed your mission and someone should know about it right? Press L key to check which NPC to talk to.
The townspeople seem to be running away from something!%% Let's go talk to that girl and find out.
How to move
You can move in 8 directions by using the directional keypad. Try the right key first to move forward.
How to Attack
You can attack with the X key. Face towards your enemy and press X
Speak with NPCs
Press the space bar once you're nearby a NPC. You can also use the left mouse click to speak to NPCs nearby.

To complete Adventure Quests, look for NPCs with Yellow Question Marks above their head.
To complete Repeated Quests, look for NPCs with Blue Question Marks above their head.

Control the movements of your character through the Arrow Keys. Come on master, follow me!
Press C to jump and the arrow key of the direction you want to go. You can overcome obstacles by doing so. Go ahead, try it!
Dash by pressing the same arrow key twice. It consumes mana though, if your mana is low then you can't use skills.
While dashing, you can press C to jump farther. Go ahead and try it, master.
We've ran into trouble already! Don't worry, you can attack by using the X key!
Press and hold the Z key and don't move, you can do a very powerful charged attack(Anti-air attack for Archers). It will be stopped if you get hit, so watch out!
Press A to use your magic skill. It will help you a lot against strong enemies.
Master, this is the portal to Odelia. Press Z to crossover.

Lots of tradespeople work here, as well as the descendants of the heroes who threw Elga into his prison the last time.%% You should talk to people in the town and ask about for more information.%% Make sure you talk to Dun Morgan, the town chief. He'll know what you need to do next.
If you need to talk to someone, press the {C=0xFF016295/}Space Bar{C=0xFF4D0D08/} or {C=0xFF016295/}Left Click{C=0xFF4D0D08/} on them.

You have just entered a hunting field.%% These areas used to be peaceful, but recently they have become no-go areas for most people. You're a bit stronger than most though, but keep your wits about you.%% You will have to fight your way through many enemies before you get to their boss.%% Get through the field as quickly as possible while avoiding getting hit, and try to build up your combos by dashing in-between groups to get a better reward.%% I trust you remember your skills from our first encounter with the wolves, you'll need them here!

Well done! You have got this far. However, each field has its own Boss Monster. These are much stronger than the normal enemies you will encounter, so you'll have to be tactical to take it down. If you get knocked down, you can roll away by {C=0xFF016295/}double tapping any direction{C=0xFF4D0D08/} as soon as you hit the ground to dodge follow on attacks. If you are defeated, you will also have the option to revive yourself using your money, or by purchasing Revival Feathers from the Dragonica Shop or can be traded with other people. Alternatively, go back to the warp, join a party with some other people and start again as a group.

There are many ways to earn gold other than merely hunting monsters. Since you can't wear other classes' equipment, try selling it to merchant NPCs or to other players.
Monster Kill Count

Monster Count is only available on the main field. For every 100, 300, 500, 700 and 1000 monster kills, a Chest corresponding to the number of kills will be given. The count will reset after 1000 kills, character death or when you exit the game.
Welcome, %class%! How may I help you today?%% Did you come to use CP this time?

Okay, you want to know about CP Store? You can earn CP when you play in PvP Ranking Mode. Also you can get a Sign of Hero at Battle square. The CP Store is where you can trade CP and Signs of Hero for items.%% Of course more items can be traded for stronger weapons and armour.%% If you want to view your CP, press I to open the inventory and look at the bottom.%% Oh, and you'll have to find your own class master to use this special store. Helpful enough?
Welcome! How may I assist you today?%% Here, you can upgrade your items via Soul Craft.

You want to know more about Soul Craft?%% All items in this world have a mysterious power called Soul Force.%% When you crystallize that mysterious power, you'll get Soul.%% Soul can be obtained by disassembling items.%% You can upgrade items via Soul Craft using Soul. Soul Craft not only increases the items' Soul Force but also imbues bonus stats to items.

Farewell. You will make lots of good friends.

2008.10.03 Class Characteristics
I want to find out about Job Change.

Knights gain their advantage and confidence from their combat gear.%%Strengthened weapons and armour have given them increased status alongside their physical strength and abilities.%%They deal a decent amount of damage to their enemies and can take more punishment than anyone else due to their increased defence.

Gladiators constantly make efforts to improve their physical body strength rather than improving their combat gear.%%They have a firm belief that combat gear can fail them at a certain point but their bodies won’t.%%Having extremely strong bodies, Gladiators wield two-handed swords and deliver powerful blows with each attack.

Monks have gained a whole new level of knowledge by combining what they’ve learned from their studies with what they have learned from the battlefield.%%In pursuit of a higher understanding, Monks participate in more battles to develop their sorcery skills.%%As the only class with resurrection and healing abilities, they are a highly valued member of any party.

Battlemages have fought countless battles over the years.%%Having failed in making their bodies stronger through magic, they strive to improve their physical strength through training.%%Though physically frail, Battlemages are highly efficient in eliminating enemies using their powerful magic spells.

Pathfinders are experts with bows and can shoot their targets from any angle.%%The so-called masters of hunting are equipped with a variety of skills that made them effective at hunting down their prey.

Arbalists are considered the strongest troops on the continent due to their ability to traverse any terrain at high speed.%%Equipped with a crossbow, they are able to shoot arrows with lightning speed and accuracy.%%They have developed a unique style of fighting, pulling out grenades, missile launchers and even a machine gun from their artillery.

Jesters have a very positive personality and always try to entertain others in a variety of ways.%%Armed with a pair of claws, they specialise in pinpoint combat and their skills allow them to attack the enemy and quickly escape with minimal damage.

Assassins are geniuses of infiltration and stealth .%%Masters of close combat, they inflict quick and successive damage to the enemy using a weapon called the 'Katar'.%%Known for using poisons as well, they eliminate multiple targets with minimal effort.
You want to know about changing class? You're a curious one aren't you? You should already know that you have to be at level 20 right?%%Which class are you interested in?
Are you wondering about changing class? Once you become level 20, you have to complete a quest from the veterans of each classes.%%Are you curious about the classes as well?

Aha! So you want to know about changing class huh? Alright I can help you. You should already know that you have to be at level 20 right?%%Just come and prove yourself to me.%%Are you curious about the classes?
You want to know about changing class?%%Just prove yourself when you're level 20 and that’s it. Alright?%% You wanna know about classes too?
So what about you guys? Are acorns still not enough for you?

You cannot continue with the quest without a survey
Let's start cooking!

Cooking the recipes will yield to items that increase HP, MP and even abilities. Right click any recipe in your inventory [Consumables] and you will see the required ingredients of the dish and its effect.

Do you fancy yourself as a chef? You have just picked up a Sesame-steamed Woodi Recipe. You can cook this to create a new item which will give you a temporary improvement to your statistics. To cook a recipe, open your inventory, click the consumables tab and right click on the recipe. Once you have all the necessary ingredients, just click cook, wait a short time and voila! You have a brand new item to use! If you have multiple recipes and all the necessary ingredients, you can use the arrows below the cooking screen to cook multiple recipes. Ready to try it? Just be careful not to burn it.
Check gift coupon
Dragon Fellowship Badge

My name is Julie. What brought you here today? Just let me know if there's anything I can do to assist you.

(Wow...! He looks so strong... Maybe he can help me...! Be brave and talk to him!!)%% Hey... Hey... %class%? If... If you have some time... Will you go on a date... date...?%%(Darn, what did I just say!? Stupid, Stupid!)%% Well, as you can see... I am a deer... my name is Rudolf. Many people know me because of a popular song, did you know I was once a star?%% Rudolf The Red Nosed Reindeer... had a very shiny nose. hehe...%% Haha, yes. I am the Reindeer with the shiny nose.%% Anyway some time ago, while travelling up here with Santa... I passed through a big lava area... and I lost Santa there... dropped him (and to make matters worse, I dropped him near Lavalon...)%% That's why I am alone here... I'm not too worried about Santa because has shown many times before that he can fight... but the real problem is that I also lost the tree for Port of the Winds for Christmas!%% This tree is very important because we promised it to the children. I heard there is a fake Santa who goes around pulling out all the tress, and my guess is that he did this to our tree! I think he took all our trees.%% %class%, please help!!

Than... Thank you!! Really Thank you! If you can gather the pieces of trees, I'll glue them back together.%% Then everything will be fine. The problem is that fake Santa...! I heard he is still roaming around the village%% Bring me 5 pieces of the tree from him. (But you can still bring me tree pieces that are in Port of the Winds already...!)
Come on... Please... Please grant my wish%% No way?? There's really no way?
Wow! Thank . you, thank you!! 5 tree pieces!! Hurry!! I need to repair. Thank you very much!!
Pieces of the Tree

Ah, %class%... I've been thinking about this... the tree doesn't need to be just in one place...%% Hehe... yes... we need to set up everywhere around Port of the winds... He said he's really angry... but people say he'll forgive me if I finish setting up these trees before he gets here!%% Santa doesn't know about this yet... so I'm in a pretty big hurry. %class%... please help me...

Come on... Please.
Not yet?? I really need to hurry and set them up before Santa gets here!

Or even longer than that. The world only for them. Now we are shutting off from their world with ours. WE've veen waiting for hero who can fight with them. A person like you.

For hunters, getting materials to maintain weapons is important, but adding equipment maintenance to this is just one task too many.%% For hunters, repairing and maintaining weapons the regular way is very expensive, and mere common hunters like us can't afford that.%% That's why hunters like us provide blacksmith with the materials required to repair weapons instead, so that the prices go down to an amount we can readily afford.%% We also get rewards from the government as well. Therefore, tax is used in a very useful way.%% Well, that's enough small talk. Now, you should get {C=0xFF016295/}Charred Stone{C=0xFF4D0D08/} which is the substance for repairing weapons, since you are also a hunter just like us.
If you want to do the work, then come back to me. You must remember, you can't do things like this anytime you want to.

From today, we'll really get into this hunter training. How do you do %class%? I am the Dragon Lord's Spirit.%% %class%, you look like you've been through a lot. In times like this, you need to find love and comfort. Love is always the source of courage.%% %class%, are you ready for an adventure of love?

%class%, find what I seek and answers to great mysteries await you.
Please hurry %class%.

Weird Ember Wolf

Here is a simple task for a %class% of your ability. You must collect a number of Scrappy Noses. The Scrappy has become popular amongst younger people as a fashion item.%%I cannot understand their love of fashion and fads, but who am I to judge? Perhaps through completing this task you will understand the love the young people feel towards their fashion.

The Scrappy's nose is the most prized amongst younger people. Collect 10 Scrappy Noses and return to me for your reward.%%Despite its ugly appearance, some people love Scrappy Noses, perhaps you will understand why when you complete this task.
What may seem trivial to you, is of great importance to others. Won't you reconsider %class%?
May the spirits guide you.
Well done %class%.
Bat nose
Raccoon Disguise

%class%, I'll give you the most important mission in love.%%As we've discovered there are many different kinds of love, if you can't tell which love is the true love, you'll lose it.%% The Raccoon people's Pinkerton is an excellent example of disguise. Just as these Raccoons disguise themselves with their wigs, love can disguise itself in many forms.%% See through their veiled attempts of deception and collect 10 Pinkerton Wigs. If you can see through one disguise, you can see through all.
A %class% like you should have no problem acquiring 10 Pinkerton Wigs. See through their deception and return to me.
You have nothing to fear but fear itself, %class%.
Believe in yourself and you will complete this task.
You did it? Congratulations! You are making steady progress, well done %class%.
The Ocean's Heartbeat

Congratulations, %class%. You have performed admirably up to now. I believe you are ready for a tougher test.%%The ocean is like a mother who cares for its children unconditionally. Even when its children harass and plague others, the ocean will still care for them%%An example of this unconditional love can be found around the Bearded Whale Coast, the Starry Lolo's, Lulu's and Lala's terrorize those who pass through - yet they are provided for unconditionally by their surroundings.%%Seek out these nasty creatures in their hospitable surroundings and slay 10 of them each.
Slay these creatures and realise that no matter how you are loved, there is always a chance you will be led astray.
%class%... Go forth and realise your potential.
What keeps you here %class%? Your destiny awaits, are you going to meet it?
Congratulation! %class%, you did it. Good job.
Starry Lolo
Starry Lulu
Starry Lala
Crabby's Protective Nature

%class%, you've made real progress.%%You've learned of the many facades and functions of love but you still have someway to go. Love can make one feel protected.%%This protection can sometimes manifest itself physically. An example of this physical manifestation can be found in the Crabbies along the coast beside Port of the Winds.%%These creatures live in the same habitat as the Starries and benefit from it immensely.%%Along with nature's love, their shell protects them from those who would defend themselves from their obnoxious behaviour.%%Go and confront these creatures and report back to me on your progress.

Crabs can be strong opponents. Prove your worth and retrieve their pincers. The prize asset amongst the crabs is Soy Sauce Crab, which you can get from the Razor Crabby. Bring me back these two items and prove yourself worthy of loftier tasks.
Hmm...%class%, you have proven yourself loyal to the cause before, what has changed?
Still trying? Believe in yourself and you shall succeed.
Well done %class%, I rarely see someone as dedicated to their tasks as you.
Soy Sauce Crab
Black and White Twin Wolves

By now you've realised that love is a double edged blade. For all its good it can attract a bad side. There is no better example of this than the two wolves that roam around Windia plains.%%Vegas and Vagabond have shown a love for hate and do as they please, without thinking of the consequences.%%It is up to you %class%, to teach them a lesson they'll never forget. Do not give it a second thought and slay those evil wolves.

Slay the Wolves and their pack and return to me with 5 Vagabond's Hearts and 5 pieces of Vega's hair. They will ask for mercy, but give it you shall not; like they had not given it to their victims in the past.
Fear is natural, but I have faith that you will overcome it %class%. Return to me when you are ready.
You will be successful!
You have returned! Well done %class%.
Vagabond's Heart
Vegas's Hair
Giant Axe Brothers

By now I'm sure you've encountered the Axe Brothers, Kunka and Sanka? Having been abandoned by their mother when they were young, the brothers turned to evil to satisfy their needs.%%Kunka and Sanka have no respect for other people and prey on passersby to gain some sort of self worth.
They cannot be allowed to continue operating this way. It is up to you %class% to put an end to their dastardly behaviour and return to me with evidence that you have succeeded.
You don't look so good. Did you confront the Axe Brothers?
Brave %class%, step forward!
You've done what I've asked of you, well done %class%.
Sanka's Skull Shield
Kunka's Helmet
Show Couple

%class% you have displayed tremendous courage up until this point. You are an excellent example of someone overcoming the difficulties they face, you should be proud of this.%%You have learned of the many ways love effects the environment around you. Despite the many evils in the world - love has an effect on everyone and everything%%Captains Hookah and Alvida, despite hating most of everything around them, share an unprofound love for each other.%%This combination of hate and love has proven highly dangerous, they show no remorse to anyone but themselves.%%It is up to you to show them that their attitude will not be tolerated any longer - and return to me with trophies of your success.
Defeating them won't be easy - but you have proven yourself more than capable of dealing with the challenges I have placed in front of you up until now.
I know they're ugly but their looks are the least of your worries. Remember %class%, love is blind .
%class%, I'll be counting on you.
I heard you defeated them! %class%, great job!
Captain Hookah's Heart
Captain Alvida's Jewel Hook
Scientist's Mysterious Screams

I'm sure by now you've heard of how the once benevolent Dr. Farrell has been corrupted through evil. Like you, he once took this test.%%It was many years ago... Unfortunately he never gained the insight required to truly appreciate love in all it's forms.%%Fight your way through his manor and challenge him to awake from his evil ways.
This is a very difficult test. I have faith in you %class%.
How can you give up now? I can't force you . but I feel sorry for you.
May the spirits guide you.
You never cease to amaze me with your ability brave %class%.
Rage of Lavalon

Brave %class%, I have never seen someone improve so much over such a short period of time.%%People speak your name across the land - regaling others of your bravery and heroics. You are truly loved amongst the people.%%As always, there are sceptics amongst them - prove them wrong; slay Lavalon in Valid Raeth - prove once and for all you are the strongest %class%.
This is a very difficult test. I have faith in you %class%.
How can you give up now? I can't force you . but I feel sorry for you.
May the spirits guide you.
You've slain the mighty Lavalon? I'm shocked... But pleased.%%Well done %class%.
Protection of Cupid

%class%, you've learned the real truth of love through all these tests of love. But love also can be a luxury.%%Destiny needs to lead and one must try their best to maintain the relationship. Without a strong mind, the god of love won't give protection either%% Don't you want to have your own love on your side under protection of Cupid, %class%? Don't you want to avoid heartbreak in love?
This is reward for you, %class% This show that you do believe in real love
How can you give up now? I can't force you . but I feel sorry for you.
Good job!

{T=FTcts_13/C=0xFFA62700/}[Quest Requirements]{T=QTtext/C=0xFF4D0D08/} Join 1 daly quest with {C=0xFF016295/}Hunter G{C=0xFF4D0D08/}! You can do this by {C=0xFF016295/}Registering as a hunter (Confirm Button){C=0xFF4D0D08/}
Register as Beginner class hunter
Register your interest!
To gain stronger power

I believe you have that potential who can follow the footsteps of previous heroes. You can probably promote yourself into a higher class, you have that potential, %class%.%% I guess I'm the only one who can train and lead you since all the other veterans are out looking to seal Elga%% To confront stronger enemies, you must train more. Will you accept my offer?
I don't think this test is hard for you since you defeated Lavalon. There are strong monsters dominating around Scalding Swamps.%% Achieve 200 combo or more against them.
in your case, you won't advance further than this. You'll hit the wall. You must change your decision.
We don't have enough time. We must hurry
Achieved 200 Combos!
{T=FTcts_13/C=0xFFFF2D09/}Once you complete your active daily quest, you can proceed to the next quest.{T=QTtext/C=0xFF4D0D08/}
{T=FTcts_13/C=0xFFFF2D09/}Once you complete your active daily quest, you can proceed to the next quest.{T=QTtext/C=0xFF4D0D08/}
{T=FTcts_13/C=0xFFFF2D09/}Once you complete your active daily quest, you can proceed to the next quest.{T=QTtext/C=0xFF4D0D08/}
{T=FTcts_13/C=0xFFFF2D09/}Once you complete your active daily quest, you can proceed to the next quest.{T=QTtext/C=0xFF4D0D08/}
{T=FTcts_13/C=0xFFFF2D09/}Once you complete your active daily quest, you can proceed to the next quest.{T=QTtext/C=0xFF4D0D08/}
{T=FTcts_13/C=0xFFFF2D09/}Once you complete your active daily quest, you can proceed to the next quest.{T=QTtext/C=0xFF4D0D08/}
{T=FTcts_13/C=0xFFFF2D09/}Once you complete your active daily quest, you can proceed to the next quest.{T=QTtext/C=0xFF4D0D08/}
{T=FTcts_13/C=0xFFFF2D09/}Once you complete your active daily quest, you can proceed to the next quest.{T=QTtext/C=0xFF4D0D08/}
{T=FTcts_13/C=0xFFFF2D09/}Once you complete your active daily quest, you can proceed to the next quest.{T=QTtext/C=0xFF4D0D08/}
{T=FTcts_13/C=0xFFFF2D09/}Once you complete your active daily quest, you can proceed to the next quest.{T=QTtext/C=0xFF4D0D08/}
{T=FTcts_13/C=0xFFFF2D09/}Once you complete your active daily quest, you can proceed to the next quest.{T=QTtext/C=0xFF4D0D08/}
{T=FTcts_13/C=0xFFFF2D09/}Once you complete your active daily quest, you can proceed to the next quest.{T=QTtext/C=0xFF4D0D08/}
Negotiating Devil's Soul Stone
What is Devil's Soul Stone?
Close Window
Then good luck to you.

You want to know about Devil's Soul Stone?%% You want to feel what it's like in the world of darkness? Well... Sure, I'll show you... It's not that hard to do.%% You can enter the world of the unknown by using the stone. And this world existed for many years now, even before our existence.%% This world was once abundant and the creatures that lived there only fed on water and plants to survive.%% But the inevitable happened, the humans discovered their world and started to ruin it.%% The creatures fought back with all of their might and discovered the great power within themselves.%% Influenced by the destruction brought by the humans, they become corrupt and started eating human flesh...%% In the long run, the humans were unable to contain these creatures and offered them a treaty that would enable them to coexist.%% This here is top secret... Ever since that treaty was signed, humans have been offering dead people to these creatures to keep them away from the human world.%% Now, I'm trying to put an end on all of these before something bad might happen again. I've been secretly contacting brave warriors who I can fight with.%% That's the reason why I'm here.%% Now that you know everything, are you willing to join this movement? I'm not forcing you or anything. Bring the Devil's Soul Stone and return to me.
Bring the Devil's Soul Stone near the guardian of the Gate to Hell around the Hidden Map. Then I'll show you the whole new world.
Did you bring the Devil's Soul Stone?

The Devil's Soul Stone is not easy to find. What I know is that you can get it from the creatures of the other world.%% The leader (Elite) that exists in every land of the {C=0xFFFF2D09/}Mission Map{C=0xFF4D0D08/} Holds a key.%% Slay them and you'll find the way to get the Devil's Soul Stone.
How to get Devil's Soul Stone?
Kunka Mission Map (1 Star)
Kunka Mission Map (2 Stars)
Kunka Mission Map (3 Stars)
Secret to a hunter's survival

The hunter's secret for survival? Well, a rookie such as yourself would not understand even if I tell you.%% Honestly, there's no special secret, rookie! You just have to be persistent. And you have to be passionate on what you're doing. Then one day you'll have an epiphany, you'll just realize how much you've grown and become much stronger. Just like I am right now, hahaha.%% One more thing, you need to possess a wisdom just like mine. You want to know how? Are you listening?%% There's no other way but to train hard. Train like there's no tomorrow. That's the secret.
Why don't you go and try to achieve a 100 hit combo against the monsters in Nautilus Port.
Hmpf! You want to be the best, but you don't want to train?
Achieve a 200 hit combo
Finding another self

Have you been to the PvP arena? The PvP arena is a good place to measure up your abilities against other warriors.%% You'll find a lot of skilled warriors in there and you can have some friendly or not so friendly PvP matches to develop your combat skills.%% Through PvP, you can find out ways on how to improve your defensive and offensive prowess. So, what are you waiting for? Try it out and achieve 10 wins.

Good. Let's see how fast you can win 10 PvP matches. You know how to get in to the PvP room, right?%% Well, in case not, then look at the bottom right side of your screen to see the PvP button. Just click that to enter the PvP room.
Hmpf. You're not ready.
10 victories on PvP achieved
Protecting Honour!

Historic site made for the great heroes of the past who guarded the land. There are rumours around that the Sanctuary of Heroes are being destroyed by some kind of ghosts.%% I've seen them actually, and based on my observation, I can say that they are not regular ghosts. They are monsters!%% I am Hunter G, the not so famous, but a free willed monster hunter. I can't just stand here and watch the situation go down the drain.%% We should teach them a lesson! Let's go to the sanctuary and slay those monsters.
Alright. Are you ready? Off to Mirinae Sanctuary then! Let's clear 'em out!%% Let's go to Mirinae Sanctuary Mission Map (4 Stars)
This is not hunter related, nor related to me personally. So it really doesn't matter but, don't you think we should work on this together?
Clear Mirinae Sanctuary Mission (4 Stars)
Ghost Appearance

As I was investigating around the sanctuary, I realized that there are monsters that look like ghosts. They're like lost souls wandering around not knowing where to go.%% I'm pretty sure that someone's controlling them. Of all places, I think the Mission Map of Skippy Sanctuary looks most suspicious.%% Slaying all the monsters in there would be the best way to protect the sanctuaries. Let's go to Skippy Sanctuary then.
Don't expect that you'll bump into me all over Elyades.
This is not hunter related, nor related to me personally. So it really doesn't matter but, don't you think we should work on this together?
Skippy Sanctuary Mission (4 Stars)
Short Business Relationship

You! I heard you're gathering Granite, is that true? Oh, I didn't expect you'll tell me, but I guess it's true. I understand, Granite is a must for producing strong weapons.%% Look at the sword I have right here, it's made from Granite. And I'm looking to get some more.%% Well, if you do what I tell you then I'll be able to get some. To be honest, I've only got 5. You know they're hard to get, right?

Good. Working together all of a sudden makes me feel a little awkward. But something's got to give, right?%% I've been collecting some items lately. You see this? It's called a Magma Marble. Bring me 10 of these and I'll be able to make some Granite from them.%% You should consider yourself lucky, I don't choose just anybody for these missions. I'll be waiting here for you.
Oh really? Fine then, I'm not going to force you. But we'll see who's sorry later!
Condensed Magma Marble
Continued Relationship

Around the Dangerous Caverns is the mining area. There you'll find abundant raw materials that you can use for producing great weapons. I know that for a fact, but I'm too lazy to go there myself.%% Recently, I heard that Blue Mythrils can also be found there. If you do me a favour, we might work something out.%% Bring me Blue Mythrils and in return I'll give you a Hunter Capsule.
Please be careful. It's been quite a while since anyone has been seen there. Don't push your luck, you're still too inexperienced.%% I think 20 Blue Mythrils should do. Thank you.
What's this? Now you don't want to? Is that it?
Blue Mythril
Loneliness of The Wild is Instinct

If you don't have a place that you call home, you'll sometimes realize how lonely you are in life. And when that realization strikes me, I just drink a lot until I pass away. Huh? Why are you looking at me like that?%% I'm just a human being. I can't help it. You must be wondering why I'm talking about this stuff, huh? It's because I'm all out of drinks and chow.%% I can easily order the drinks but the chow is the problem... The chow made from the wild is the most delicious. Let's get the chow together, what do you say?%% Let me see... What should be good? I'm sick of Raccoon jerky. Hmmm... That's it! I heard that Nyla from Libra has this chow called Raisins. It sells really well and I want to try it.
Good! You can get those Raisins if you go around the Valid Raeth Mission Map.%% Get me those Raisins and I'll give you an item that could be useful to you.%% 20 Raisins would be enough for me.
Now I'm some kind of a joke to you? Have you forgotten who got you here?!
Raisin Snacks
Let's save the fire!

A hunter like me enjoys the outdoor and believe me when I say that you can't live outdoors without fire. It doesn't matter if it's summer, winter, spring or whatever. I'd say fire is a necessity for us, hunters.%% It cooks your food, brings you warmth, lightens up dark places and many others. Without fire, you can't pretty much do anything.%%Valid Raeth is a good place, it sums up all the things I've mentioned. Just look at this place, It's like a garden of fire, isn't it? Haha.

Since fire is a hunter's companion, we need something that can easily start a fire.%% I thought of something and come up with a simple solution. A hunter must always carry a flint. You can easily get a spark out of flints to start a fire.%% An easy place to get this material is in Valid Raeth. Slay the monsters over there and they will drop those.%% Bring me 20 flints. I'll watch you and see how much you've improved.
Oh yeah? You better hope you don't run into me again then!

I don't know if all of all of my parts are gone. But I'm sure that the monsters around that area will have them.%% Collecting all of my parts would be really tough but 10 ain't impossible. I need to do some hunting chores so I have to leave this to you.
You're not ready yet. You're far from it.
No I insist, you first.

I've seen many monsters around this land, but they're so weak I couldn't even class them as enemies.%%I'd treat them more like a plaything than anything else. But lately, I've encountered monsters called 'Ahtoo'. They live in the Dangerous Caverns %%Apparently, they are extremely smart creatures and have a multitude of attacks. So, you're probably wondering why I haven't confronted them yet? Well the thing is, I had such a big dinner last night I'm not as agile as I should be. Why don't you try your skills on some Ahtoo and report back to me. Make sure you don't kill them all!
I can tell that sounds appealing to you, you've come a long way!%%Slay the Ahtoo in the Dangerous Caverns 4 Star Mission Map.
Ahtoo (Mission Map 4 Stars)
Ah, don't look at me that way. I'll give you your fair share.%%We can make a small fortune with them. So remember, 20 Bonedile Leathers, you got that?
Unique rules of survival

Like I say all the time, we don't become hunters to show others how strong we are. I know you agree with me, hunting is a method of survival.%%We can live off the material we catch, from food to clothing - hunting is a way of life. Much like the way we stalk our prey, winter will creep up on us without knowing. We'll need some winter clothes.%%Thick leather should suffice, why don't you go hunting for us?
Ok, I'm counting on you this time. You can find Yeti's around Windia Plains.%%Their hide makes for excellent leather. Get 30 Yeti Hides but be careful - they are stronger then they look!
I'm sorry? Did you say something just then? I don’t think I heard you... what?
Yeti Hide
Ocher Forest Investigation

The Ocher Forest has been experiencing some problems lately. There are many dead trees around there and some of the animals have gone crazy.%%I don't think slaying the Woodsmen around there is going to help. Why don't you try the 1 Star Mission Map of Ocher Forest? I'll see what else I can come up with.
Get rid of those monsters in Ocher Forest at Mission Map (1 Star)
Oh this won't do at all!! It's in your best interest to cooperate with me if you want to survive in Melanathos!
Mission Map (1 Star)
The Spotted Beetles can be found in the Ocher Forest Mission Map (4 Stars). Go ahead and be on your way if you're ready!%% Don't forget, 20 Spotted Beetles.
10 victories on PvP, no more, no less. It's not impossible, but you'll see that it's not easy.

I know you might not want to do this now, but trust me - you'll love it! Anyways - I'm feeling very hungry, you gotta bring me 20 Blowfish Bombs. You'll see them around the Gods' Sanctuary Mission Map. Tonight, we'll feast! Mmmm...

Think about it. A hunter of my stature can't get into a fight with those weak creatures. I'd be made a laughing stock at the next Hunter gathering!%% You'll have to do it for me, slay 30 of those ignorant Kentars. That should get my message across.
You've defeated the rebellious Kentars, but now their leader Karkarous has risen. Let's defeat Karkarous at the Mission Map (4 Stars).

Ha! The Pooka Choppi may look weak... Try slaying 20 of them and returning.%%Even if you come back, you'll be exhausted. They are small in stature but large in numbers. You'll find them in the Land of Temptation.
Grouchy Hunter P
What!? Grouchy!? Me!? Never!%%Why are you still sat there, go and get 20...%% No, 100 Poison Vines! You can find them at the Mission Map of the Forgotten Village!%%Now we'll see who's grouchy...
Devil's Poison Vines
Stop the worm infestation
What!? You'll get rid of them once and for all? Alright then, go defeat 30 worms.
Porky's secret
There's no point in wasting time, go and find 20 Necklaces of Porky Control. I have some investigating to do.
Necklace of Porky Control
Think of this as part of your training. Slay the first of the dwarves to quieten them.%% Slay 30 of those in Frigid Canyon.
Attack at Drakos
It's name is Hermes. It can conjure an endless amount of monsters. They'll spread like vermin. Defeat 30 of them and report back to me!
Demon Hermes

Look at my arm, see that scar? A Demon bit me some years ago.%%The Scar is fine, I can live with that, but if you are bitten by those Demons you'll never forget it. You'll constantly get nightmares - some people have ended up killing themselves over them. I had to stop them, so I managed to round up all the Demons I could find and put them in Drakos.%%The nightmares subsided but they've returned. Those blasted Demons have escaped. I'm not as fit as I used to be, will you please slay the horrid Hermes Demons?
Alright, you gotta go after those Hermes again! Defeat 30 this time and return safely!
Are you busier than I am? Then just do as ordered!
Demon Hermes
Legend! Identity of Hunter X

I know you're busy with other things right now, but his is a request you can't simply refuse. Right?%%He says that the Pong Whelp's Spotted Dragon Eggs are the most valuable to him. Get 30 of them from those Grey Pong Whelps, the thing is...%%...I'm not quite sure where you'll find them. They should be somewhere around Drakos so I'd start your search there.
Spotted Dragon Eggs
NPC book additions 2008.01.06 Ho-Geun Kim

Name: Florane Occupation: Innkeeper Florane came to Odelia a year ago to set up an Inn to take advantage of the abundance of tourists in the area. She's a nice person and is extra nice to customers she likes.

Name: Billy Occupation: Merchant Billy is a local merchant in Odelia. He always talks about the bargains he can get customers - don't be fooled, he's always marking his prices up. Shop around, find a bargain!
Name: Heidi Occupation: Potion Merchant Heidi comes from a faraway place, she's a nice person but is easily confused. She's quite partial to a bit of cheese.
Name: Pamela Occupation: Wine Merchant Pamela became very lonely when her two sons left her to go travelling. She's known to stop passers-by and ask if they've met her sons on their travels.
Name: Oliver Occupation: Guard One of the Odelia guardsmen. He manages to get himself into all sorts of trouble; this doesn't help when he has to work with the new guy, Guppy.
Name: Zaza Occupation: Boatman Zaza is a skilled boatman who used to take people from Odelia to Traitor's Ridge. He's decided to diversify his business and has started to learn fishing from Primo.

Name: Guppy Occupation: Guard Guppy is a total n00b, he's only been in the Guard squad for a month. Despite his enthusiasm he's not really that good a guard. Don't tell him though; he's having a hard enough time as it is.
Name: Alvin Occupation: Hermit An old man that knows a bit about everything going on in Elyades. He's been telling passers by the same stories since anyone can remember.

Name: Darwin Occupation: Blacksmith Darwin is the blacksmith of Odelia. He repairs and can even enchant equipment, given the right materiel. He's quite sensitive to noise of blacksmithing so always wears earplugs; you may have to SPEAK UP!
Name: Jack Occupation: Thief Jack is a thief who came to the Elyades continent to find his fortune. Since his arrival the amount of thefts reported has increased, coincidence?

Name: Dustin Occupation: Guard Knight Once Lord Steven's personal Bodyguard he was dispatched by Lord Steven to deal with the monster threat to Odelia. Lately he's been very busy preparing for the legendary hero festival.
Name: Pablo Occupation: Magician Pablo has come from Libra to teach some basic skills to newbie magicians.
Name: Adelio Occupation: Bounty Hunter Adelio is the laziest mercenary you'll ever meet. Long gone are the days of his heroic antics, now he subcontracts others to do his work for him.
Name: John Occupation: Guard John's been assigned to save Lylia, unfortunately he doesn't really do much. I think you might have to help him out.
Name: Sen Occupation: Merchant Evacuation orders were given to all the local tenants of Advanced Windia Plains, but this young man could not get out on time because of his habit of getting up late.
Name: Mette Occupation: Soldier He was seriously wounded by the bandits while patrolling Traitor's Ridge.

Name: Daisy Occupation: Potion Merchant She is selling potions and supplies to rookie adventurers around Windia Plains. There's many a good bargain to be had when dealing with Daisy. She's also quite partial to a bit of cheese.
Name: Guppy Occupation: Guard/Plumber Guppy is in Traitor's Ridge in order to find some equipment to fix a plumbing problem his town has been having.

Name: Thomas Occupation: Mercenary A brave but unusual Mercenary. Rather than fight for money, Thomas fights for what's right and just. Many people wonder why he didn't join the Army - it's probably something to do with his personal hygiene - he seldom showers. That's probably why he's always alone.
Name: Rudolph Occupation: Barkeep Rudolph runs a bar in Port of the Winds. His main passion is cooking, ask him nicely and he may just rustle you up something!

Name: Jeff Occupation: Thief He's the only one who believes his brother's nonsensical treasure hunting plans. Short in stature, he makes up for it with the tall tales he tells. Apparently he's the leader of a group of 120 thieves! Ha ha ha!
Name: Leo Occupation: Town Boy Both of Leo's parents were killed in Monster raids on the Port. Jeremy took him in and is raising him as his own, but Leo is determined to avenge his parent's deaths.

Name: James Occupation: Real Estate Agent The local real estate agent James is a real wheeler and dealer. Don't try and haggle with him, he's a nickel and dime kind of guy. He's running the new House Models these days, go have a chat with him if you're interested in getting your own place.

Name: Crispin Occupation: Merchant Poor Crispin's a nice guy but he very rarely gets a break in life. Not exactly pleasing on the eye, Crispin was recently accused of being a bank robber due to his similarity to that Axel that robbed the bank.

Name: Florane Occupation: Innkeep Florane made her fortune from her succesful accomodation business in the Port of the Winds. All that wealth has made her lazy and she just doesn't put the same effort into her business these days.

Name: Cindy Occupation: Thief Cindy is a real femme fatale. Beautiful and dangerous, she's made it her mission to convince people that not all thieves are bad people. She's nice to strangers, but don't cross her!
Name: Victor Occupation: Guard Victor guards the main gate to the Port of the Winds. He keeps away any traveller who looks suspicious and is known to ask others to perform certain tasks for him.
Name: Daisy Occupation: Potion Merchant Daisy comes from the same land as Heidi. She is quite knowlegable about herbalogy and potion making.
Name: Jeremy Occupation: Great Sage Usually hangs around the Port of the Winds telling interesting stories to local kids. Despite his age, he still think he's 'With it'.
Name: Ersil Occupation: Town Boy Ersil is another youngster who fell for fishing, the latest trend of Port of the Winds. If you bring him something fishing related he'll reward you well!
Name: Vincent Occupation: Caretaker Vincent takes care of all the issues facing Port of the Winds. When Steven says 'Jump' Vincent says 'How high?'.
Name: Sofia Occupation: Banker Sofia is a smart and collected banker. She always seems calm and relaxed. A lot of people think Sofia and Guppy have a thing for each other.
Name: Anna Occupation: Town Girl A little girl who has started fishing out of curiosity after seeing Primo around Port of the Winds.
Name: Primo Occupation: Fisherman Primo is a fisherman who goes fishing around Port of the Winds everyday. He isn't very clean and smells of fish. But he's a really nice guy.

Name: Rony Occupation: Veteran Archer Rony trains and educates archers at Port of the Winds. He is also very passionate about archery. His other passion in life is women. He's quite the charmer. Oh... Rony!

Name: Amy Occupation: Pet Merchant A very cheerful local pet merchant at Port of the Winds. Amy is having a hard time due to a rumour that she is a bit of an exhibitionist. The local bachelors aren't complaining about it.
Name: Colin Occupation: General Lord Steven's top General. Colin is recruiting able bodies to help the fight against evil on the continent.

Name: Steven Jr. Occupation: Lord The Lord of Port of the Winds, offically known as Lord Steven Jr. He was once a brave Warrior and now seeks to form the Fellowship of the Dragon to ensure the safety of the world.
Name: Evan Occupation: Veteran Warrior Trains and educates warriors. He believes that physical strength is the most important virtue of a Warrior.
Name: Davy Occupation: Blacksmith Davy likes to regale people with his heroic stories. Most people say about 98.2% of his stories are lies. Then again, 76% of all statistics are made up.
Name: Walter Occupation: Guard No one is quite sure whether Walter is brave or just stupid. Either way, he carries out any mission put to him.

Name: Edeline Occupation: Veteran Magician Edeline trains and educates magicians at sorcery school. Edeline chose to work in the Elyades Continent because there is a serious lack of qualified magicians there.
Name: Mario Occupation: Supply Officer The troops that were transporting supplies to Ellora Camp were ambushed by the Mole people. Mario is the only survivor.
Name: Jared Occupation: Guard Jared is a guard assigned to Valid Raeth. To say he doesn't like this assignment is an understatement. Some people just aren't into molten rock and lava fields!
Name: Swirl Occupation: Guard Swril used to be a close friend of Doug, but a recent misunderstanding between them has meant they're not talking anymore.

Name: Herna Occupation: Banker It looks like Herna's lent money to everyone. Her bank is about to go broke! A lot of her customers are simply not paying her back and she can't do anything about it. I wonder if she'll give you a loan?
Name: Koneil Occupation: Merchant Koneil runs the general store in Libra. He's not a very interesting person and whatever you do - don't ask him about his stamp collection!
Name: Edith Occupation: Pet Merchant Edith loves animals. So much so that she's concentrating on developing new line of pet food. She's going to call it 'Edith's Eats', catchy isn't it?

Name: Adelio Occupation: Bounty Hunter You'll find him standing around a wanted board, looking for people to do his work for him. He used to be quite a good bounty hunter but money and laziness took its toll. He suffers from an 'injured' leg these days.

Name: Nyla Occupation: Innkeeper Even Nyla's business has suffered during the worldwide recession. The monster attacks have meant a stop to tourism in the town. Even the soldiers that frequent the Inn have stopped because their paychecks have been delayed.
Name: Frank Occupation: Merchant All though not a native of Libra, Frank has made it his home and likes to help where he can.
Name: Smith Occupation: Blacksmith The friendly blacksmith, he likes to help the good monsters of Dragotaka. Recently a Smart Woodi he was talking to went missing. He seems quite concerned.

Name: Doug Occupation: Guard Doug the guard has been very anxious since his wife, Mimi has been dispatched to Ellora camp to help with the injured soldiers. This isn't helped by the situation with Balder.
Name: Pablo Occupation: Magician Pablo is focused on getting to the bottom of the Farrell situation.
Name: Robbie Occupation: Lumberman Robbie is a lumberman who is working at Ocher Forest. He is very upset with the monsters that are felling his trees.
Name: Pyrei Occupation: Kentar Leader Evil Kentars started to fight against them to protect sacred temples.
Name: Ponga Occupation: Merchant Merchant in Fungoid Village
Name: Ringo Occupation: Unemployed Ringo married a girl without knowing that she is a fairy. On finding out the truth he left his wife and ran away. He's a bit of a coward to say the least...

Name: Fungarf Occupation: Village Chieftain Fungarf has been the chief of the Fungoid Village for more than 500 years. He believes the village has been ruined because of the irresponsible attitude of the Humans. As such he has a lot of misgivings about mankind, as do most of his people.
Name: Massenran Occupation: Merchant When the Fungoid Village was attacked, Massenran came from the Elyades Continent to volunteer for the restoration work.

Name: Sanson Occupation: Blacksmith Blacksmith working in the Fungoid Village. He is relatively new to the village, but he speaks the Fungoid language fluently. Maybe you should ask him for some pointers.
Name: Camilla Occupation: Banker Camilla works at the local bank in the Fungoid Village. She's a bit strange, so don't make any sudden movements!
Name: Spooky Occupation: Village Magician The Fungoid people's Chief Magician. Spooky is a close friend and advisor of Chief Fungarf.

Name: Yanick Occupation: Guard Yanick is stationed in the Fungoid Village. He is a very experienced guard who knows about village surroundings very well. Some people think he has a crush on Mosanra. It must be her personality...
Name: Chris Occupation: Guard Chris is a reliable soldier sent to guard the Fungoid Village. Due to the increased working hours he finds himself getting hungry quite easily.
Class Veterans They are class veterans that have come to support the Fungoid Village army after the monster attacks.

Name: Gallia Occupation: Keeper of the Forest Gallia is the keeper of the forest whose duty it is to preserve the forest and its inhabitants. The Fungoid people depend on the forest for their well being so the Keeper of the Forest is a revered person amongst them.
Name: Dennis Occupation: Miner Dennis is a miner who mines ore in the Land of Temptation. However the Golems have him in serious trouble.
Name: Grania Occupation: Fairy A fairy crying in the Frigid Canyon. Her wailing cries pierce through the quite canyon. Someone has to shut her up, she's very loud!

Name: Mimi Occupation: Nurse Doug's wife Mimi misses him terribly. Despite him being stationed in Libra, she had to come to Ellora Camp to help with the injuries the Fellowship sustained trying to take Drakos.
Name: Anders Occupation: Blacksmith Known as a very capable blacksmith in Libra
Name: Evan Occupation: Veteran Warrior Evan was responsible for training Warriors in Port of the Winds. Due to the need for reinforcements he came to Ellora Camp.
Name: Colin Occupation: General General Colin is in command of the First Battalion of the Fellowship of the Dragon. He's been tasked to find out what happened to the missing soldiers.
Name: Massenran Occupation: Merchant A Fungoid Merchant. Like all good business men Massenran knows a good opportunity when he sees one, that's why he's in Ellora Camp supplying goods.
Name: Adelio Occupation: Bounty Hunter Adelio is still trying to find a way to make money even at Ellora Camp. It'd be better to stay away from him.
Name: Matthew Occupation: Traveller Matthew happened into Drakos during his travels. He became amnesiac when a mysterious man attacked him.
Name: Kaun Occupation: Soldier Kaun helps guard Ellora Camp and has been involved in the previous attempts to siege Drakos.
Name: Lucas Occupation: Soldier Lucas helps guard Ellora Camp and has been involved in the previous attempts to siege Drakos.
Name: Camek Occupation: Soldier Camek helps guard Ellora Camp and has been involved in the previous attempts to siege Drakos.
Name: Ronald Occupation: Soldier Ronald helps guard Ellora Camp and has been involved in the previous attempts to siege Drakos.
Name: Jack Occupation: Thief Jack and his crew have finally arrived at the Drakos. They seem to have followed the Fellowship of Dragon to find treasure.

Name: Dony Occupation: Guild Manager Dony is shy around others, but doesn't let that get in the way of his responsibilities. He's been managing the guilds for a long time and is willing to help any aspiring guild master.
Name: William Occupation: Emporia Caretaker The Priest who is manages Emporia.
Name: Julie Occupation: Soul Craft Merchant Julie is the Grand Daughter of the Soul Craft Master, James Brown. She has been running his shop since James left to find some Soul items.
Name: Dun Morgan Occupation: Town Chief Dun Morgan has been having a hard time lately. Not only is his village under threat of attack from the wolves, but his daughter has been kidnapped too!
Name: Sigin Occupation: Soldier Private Sigin has come out to Steven Trading Port to help stop the threat of the Joyce Pirates.

Name: Parker Occupation: Special Agent Parker or Special Agent 0069 is renowned across Dragotaka for his detective work. Apparently he uses his incredible sense of smell to find evidence. Some people call him the 'Bloodhound'.

Name: Gatto Occupation: Event Organizer Gatto is some sort of animal from a faraway land that loves to party. Quite literally a party animal! Gatto travels from Town to Town organising and running events.
Name: Romero Occupation: Soldier Romero guards Ellora Camp and has tried to eliminate the monsters at Drakos.
Name: Lord Jr. Occupation: Avatar of the Dragon King Avatar of the Dragon Lord who is looking for heroes who can stop Paris' evil plan of ressurecting Elga.
Mail Box Mail boxes can be used to easily send shipments and messages to far away friends.

Wanted Bulletin There are many Wanted notices around the world of Dragotaka. The main purpose of the boards is to serve bounties on certain monsters. People those who slay the wanted monsters are rewarded handsomely.
Name: Rose Rose manages House Models.
Name: Montero Occupation: Supply Officer All of his troops on the supply route to Ellora Camp vanished after an ambush by some mole monster.
Name: Hoffman Occupation: Capt. Of the Guards Captain of the guards in Libra
Name: Baron Occupation: Dark Magician Some say Baron is working on a project to open a gateway to another world. Others say he's one sandwhich short of a picnic.
Name: Mosanra Occupation: Innkeeper Mosanra the Innkeeper is considered one of the most beautiful women amongst the Fungoid people. That doesn't say much for the other women...
Name: WookiBooki The only bandit of the Udaka Bandits that hasn't fallen victim to the witch's spell
Name: Hunter G One of the famous monster hunters found in Dragotaka. Hunter G's skills are legendary amongst hunters. He'll gladly give pointers and tips to aspiring monster hunters.
Name: Hunter P A famous monster hunter that operates in Melanthos. He is willing to share his experience and skills with those who complete his tasks.
Name: Bessie Occupation: Exchange Merchant Currently teaching two apprentices.
Name: Jerome Occupation: Bessie's Apprentice Jerome is very timid.
Name: Romy Occupation: Bessie's Apprentice Romy is Bessie's grand-daughter. She's very naughty.
Name: Brutus Occupation: Best cook Brutus is collecting ingredients for exquisite dishes.
Name: Nicola Occupation: Physicist Nicola is studying dimensions. Everything seems simple, but it's really not.

Welcome to the tutorial mode! Dragonica is an action game centred around keyboard play. Forget about that mouse and enjoy!
Entering Tutorial Mode
Magic Shots Gained
To defeat Lavalon, you must first activate the Magic Cannon. The Magic Shots required to use the Magic Cannon can be gained from monsters.
Using Magic Shots
You can load the Magic Cannon by pressing the Z key. If you move away from the cannon the loading will be cancelled.
I am a seer, I was born with certain future-seeing abilities.%% But I believe that it is very dangerous to see into the future. It may lead to disastrous results.
Don't even think about bothering me unless it's important. Unless you want an arrow in your chest.
Training is for those who are not blessed with talent. There is a certain limit when you're not born with 'leet skillz. Unless you're me, of course.
Hey there! Young man... Is there anything I can help you with? Haha!
You know, there's all kinds of potions in this world. But nothing compares to the potion made from the Makaboo Tribe's secret ingredient.%% So how about a taste? Of course you'll have to pay...
Wahahahahahahaha! Hey rookie! I'm feeling a bit rusty from all this hammering!%% You want to learn a little lesson? I can handle rookies like you with hands tied behind my back! Wahahahaha!
How did you find me? That's odd... Well, I'm in the middle of a important mission so...%% Do not bother me.
Wait a minute! You're pretty nice! I'd like to go out with you but...%% I'm not blind. heheh
Hey, you there with the cute face! %% I don't know how you found this place. But make sure you don't get in the way of Hel Krouzer.

I've been a investigator for 30 years, and it's never been such a pain as it is these days. Starting with all the crazy stuff that the crazy doctor left... Then the witch's whereabouts and now General Blood's armour...I don't even know where to start. To top it all off I've been standing here for ages, I'm cold and I'm hungry!
Do you see the portal in front of you? Stand in there then press Z.

You picked up quite fast on that one..%% Humans cannot use their abilities when they enter a different dimension.%% But if you use a {C=0xFFFF2D09/}Space-Time Shield{C=0xFF4D0D08/}, that can be fixed.%% You can use this scroll for {C=0xFFFF2D09/}20 minutes{C=0xFF4D0D08/} in order to survive in the {C=0xFFFF2D09/}Chaos World{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.%%
Anything else you need?
Me WookiBooki. Me back from trip. But something is wrong. My friends the Udaka no talk to WookiBooki. They keep hitting WookiBooki.%% What's that about? They all mean.
