Mission of Land [Soma]

Oh- you! Here is good news. Haha- finally, I, the old man, also can do something for the land. Of course I need some help of warriors like you. Have you ever heard about {C=0xFF016295/}Rare Monster{C=0xFF4D0D08/}? %% They are fearful monsters who suddenly appear and make trouble to people in several areas lately. So Steven the 2nd commanded me a crucial mission. It is to find warriors and give duties according to their abilities, to defeat the rare monsters. %% I choose you as the first warrior. Please go to {C=0xFF016295/}Advanced Windia Plains{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat {C=0xFF016295/}[Soma]{C=0xFF4D0D08/} which attacks people walking on the unfamiliar road.

Rare monsters don't stay in the same place, but appear in various places and harass people. They are very strong, so you need to be careful. However, they drop much money than general monsters, and sometimes you can get equipments and rare items. Good luck!
My mission is the mission of Steven the 2nd!
Rare monsters seldom appear, so you should be patient.

Oh, you caught him? Haha, I chose a right person. When I first met you, I knew that you are the best person for this matter. However, I heard that rare monsters would appear again. Therefore, Soma whom you just defeated,, will appear again,, Please help me then, too.
Mission of Land [Soma]

Welcome. I did more research about Soma, and it turns out that it is a leader of Woodies around. Well, there is another one, though. Well, please go to Advanced Windia Plains{C=0xFF4D0D08/} and defeat {C=0xFF016295/}[Soma]{C=0xFF4D0D08/}.
If you cannot find Soma, wait for a while. Be careful. You've defeated him one, it will be more easier. I will count on you. This time, I will prepare a gift for you.
My mission is the mission of Steven the 2nd!
Rare monsters seldom appear, so you should be patient.
Well done. I believe that Steven the 2nd his majesty will be satisfied enough. Although the rare monsters seldom appear, they keep appearing and harass citizens. So please help me later again.

Game of Death - (Content of the Event)

{C=0xFF4400BB/}Game of Death - (Explain the content of the event)%% Popular actor Billy in the Continent of the Winds has met with untimely death when he was shooting a film. %% Every martial arts masters and fans mourn his death, also wishing that this tragedy didn't befall him. %%But there was a profound mystery regarding his death. Officially announced cause of death was drug overdoes but many were not satisfied by this brief and unsatisfying statement%% Rumor has started to spread around that there is a conspiracy surrounding his death.%% Billy's death enshrouded in mystery. We must shed light to this mystery together with his best friend Taegwon Master Jun.
TW Quest

{C=0xFF01FFAE/}At the location for shooting the film, (Mission Map){C=0xFFFF2A2F/} the HP will continue to decrease because of the traps that enemies set up. If you have Martial Art Top, Pants, Glove and Shoes for the audition, your HP will not decrease.

My friend..%% Movie star Billy..I heard the news that he died while he was filming the movie%% It's really..really quite unbelievable thing has happened.%% But his death had started more questions than answers. This is also why this whole thing is hurting me so much!%%

That's right! After the investigation, the official cause of death was drug overdose, which is a complete nonsense!%% He even refused to have an acupuncture treatment when he suffered from severe indigestion. My friend cannot have overdosed since he was so aversive to all forms of medical treatment.%% This is why I, Master Jun decided to investigate everything about this mystery from scratch. This is for my friend and to uphold the honorable reputation of an actor!
Questionable death? What are you talking about?
How will you investigate this?

Add a help for MyHome
What does Hometown?

What does Hometown?%% Hometown is a place to concentrate many MyHomes in the certain area. Currently, Hometown is located at the island in the sky above in the middle of Port of Winds.%% Of course, we will construct it continuously, what if people want to have it.
What does MyHome?

Player can have his own shelter in the game, and decorate it with spending a lot of time together wit their friends too.%% Moreover, if you placed a furniture inside, you will get special buff and there will be post system and safe box.%% Oh, there are two types of MyHome, first one is going to be acquired by auction, and another one is going to be sold with certain price.
Auction Board of MyHome

In this auction ad board of MyHome, you will get some information about MyHome's address, owner, and address along with to start bidding.%% And if you select a category which is located at the top, you will see many information such as opened MyHome, not opened MyHome, bid...
MyHome bidding

Select what you wanted to buy through a board of MyHome Bidding and just looking for a house. And just lick the 'Bidding' button and write about it.%% One thing that you should know is that, you should bet more than amount of betting%% After you bid, it will not be cancelled so please be careful%% What? If you are not in case of you are not a highest bidder?%%x Then, you will get back your money through on-game post system and you will bid again after 5 minutes.%%
Purchasing MyHome APT

If you hit the level 25, you can buy MyHome APT in regular payment basis. Oh, you should know about this... you have to pay 5 percent of total APT cost as a tax.%% Basically it is very similar with MyHome like bidding system but there's something differences. If you want to buy it, let's try.
Having a buff of furniture

Do you wanna know about to have a buff of furniture?%% For having a buff, you should place a furniture on your MyHome first and you will get a buff from it.%% Furniture buffs will be maintained for 30 minutes, 1 hour, 2 hours, and 3 hours along with it will be gone when you logged out.%% If someone left a visitor's message on the guest register, another player will get same buff.%% Anything else?
Method to locate a furniture

Select a furniture in the cash inventory and click on right button of mouse then you'll see MyHome furniture. At here, you will control the location of furniture.%% If you want to change its location and place, do the same like click on right mouse button and you can move your furniture or remove your furniture.%% If you want to move your furniture, you can move and furniture will rotate by 90 degree at once you clicked right mouse button.%% Moreover, if you want to remove your furniture, your furniture will be removed and it's going into your cash inventory.%% Anything else?
Inviting a guest

Ah-- you wanted to invite a guest?%% Then, you should issue an invitation first. Click invitation issue button on the monitor and write a character name who has been invited.%% Click 'completed' button and invitation will deliver to selected guest.%% However, there will be a limitation to issue of invitation.(Low class: 10, Mid-Class: 15, High Class: 20, Highest Class: 30) If you get an invitation once, your mini-map will let you know and you will see invitation in the invitation list.%% In that situation, just click MyHome enter icon, you will be automatically transported to sender of invitation.%% But you have to use it in 24 hours.%% Anything else?
Moving MyHome

In case of click house icon in the mini-map, there will be [Go to MyHome]. %% When you click [Go to Myhome] button, you will be moved to MyHome.%% But, it will work in the village only.%% Anything else?
Tax paying

If you have MyHome, you have to pay 5 percent of tax in every week.%% If you are not paying, your situation will be arrears, and my, butler's function would go wrong.%% Whenever you pay every amount of delayed tax, butler would go back on the right track.%% If you are not paid for more than 4 weeks, you got to be the bum's rush, and your furniture will move to post box automatically.%% Please consider a date of tax payment for prevention of bum's rush.%% Anything else?

You will add MyHome which has purchased through butler on auction list.%% You will be added 5% commission and auction will not be proceed when you don't have enough commission.%% You will be charged 50% of cancellation fee while you are trying to cancel an auction, and you will not cancel if you don't have enough commission.%% If you have succeed to auctioning, you will get 90% of payment by post.%% Anything else?
What's your question? Regarding MyHome, you will be welcomed all the time.
How may I help you?
Come to me whenever you feel free to ask something
I will do my best for you.
Cooperation Play - 1o min

Accomplished Achievement!
You have accomplished Achievement. Let's equip medal!
What is Achievement?

The records that you accomplish during the game, are Achievements. If you want to check Achievements, you can find it in the {C=0xFF016295/}Journal (Hot key J) {C=0xFFFFFFFF/}. You can get medals when you accomplish these achievements. You also can use these from the achievement page. When you equip the medal, a title will be shown above the character and some stats are also increased.

You can see the Mission Mode Rank using details.
In order to get points in the Mission Mode, just hit the monsters. Easy- huh-? (test)
Got the item which is able to move to Chaos map.
What is Chaos map?

Chaos maps are in another continent where time and space is twisted. If you hunt the monsters in the chaos map, you can get rare items. {C=0xFF016295/}[How to move]{C=0xFFFFFFFF/} You need to exchange Devil’s Soul Stone with Elga’s Soul at Libra and Port of Winds. You can purchase proper level Chaos Scrolls, and Shields of Time Space, which you require. ( if you don’t have Shield of Time Space buff, you can only do 1 damage to monsters.)

Get a Daily Quest from Hunter G

Players can take 10 Hunter G quests in one day. If you complete all 10 quests in a day, you will receive a bonus amount of EXP. Accepting and Completing quests can be done remotely through the icon of Hunter G at the bottom of the screen.
Talk to Hunter G

Hello! You've got a brave and wise-looking face! I was once the greatest warrior in all of Dragotaka, would you like me to train you?%% If you want to become as great as I once was, then you need to take Hunter G's daily quests!
I would like to know more
Hunter G? Who is this man?
Hunter G's daily quest
You are able to carry out Hunter G's daily quest.

Once you reach level 24, you can take a daily quest from Hunter G in the Port of the Winds. You can take 10 quests per day, and you will get double EXP every time you finish a quest. Accepting and Completing quests can be controlled remotely through an icon of Hunter G at the bottom of the screen.
Detailed information on Hunter G's Daily Quests
Shiny Snow Crystal
Lumpy Snow Crystal
Successfully transformed into Sanka!

If you transformed in to Sanka, monster will not attack you. But if you attack monsters first, the magic will be disappeared. You cannot enter hero quest if you failed in transformation. If you lost Sanka's look, find Wookiboki and talk to him again.
Find 5 secret keys.

In order get into Dr. Farrell's Laboratory, you need 5 keys. Dr. Farrell hide the keys inside of the monsters which he has done medical experiment.%% 5 keys are hidden in several places in Dr. Farrell's Manor. Be careful! The ways are very complicated.%% Ah, one more thing.%% When you get a party, party master must have 5 keys. It's one of trick which Dr. Farrell has set up. Don't forget!
In order get into Dr. Farrell's Laboratory, you need 5 keys.
Acquired Fire Key!
Acquired Fire Key! In order get into Dr. Farrell's Laboratory, you need 5 keys. If you are in a party, party master must hold all five keys to enter the Dr. Farrell's Laboratory.
Acquired Water Key! In order get into Dr. Farrell's Laboratory, you need 5 keys. If you are in a party, party master must hold all five keys to enter the Dr. Farrell's Laboratory.
Acquired Wooden Key! In order get into Dr. Farrell's Laboratory, you need 5 keys. If you are in a party, party master must hold all five keys to enter the Dr. Farrell's Laboratory.

Tell me about GADA coin

Gada coin is in a treasure box which you can get if you kill 100, 300, 500, 700 and 1000 monsters at fields. Higher counts, more coins in it. Gada coin is related with mission clear reward. If you click ‘?' during mission reward after clear the mission, you can get your class's item which is not able to get from fields. If you are lucky, you can get the set items, so try hard!
I want to create a guild

You can create a guild if you go to Dony at Port of Winds. In order to create guild, you Lv should more than 10 and need 20 gold. You can use guild skill when you create a guild and higher Lv guild, there are more skills. To manage guild, there is a guild icon(hot key G) on bottom right.
Be benefited with your friends creating a guild!
I want to share my information. Tell me about the character card.

You can share your information with others using character card. You can get it from Victor once you have done the quest from him. Others can recommend your card and if you got many recommendations from others, you will get various buffs which are good for hunting. Make as many as friends using character card and get special buffs!
I want to know how to use Soul Craft.

You can upgrade you items with soul craft. If you upgrade your item with soul craft, various options will be given. Also, you can release the cursed item with Julie at town. In order to release the curse, you need certain amount of money and souls. Possible Number of enchant is different with the grade of items. Therefore, if you want to get high number of enchant, you need to upgrade your grade through soul craft.
Tell me about Soul

You can get the souls to decompose the items which have soul. Amount of souls are differ to the items. Soul can be used to unseal sealed items. Julie will exchange soul to unseal scroll and you can unseal the item with it. Soul also able to use soul craft.
I want to have powerful weapon. Tell me about Enchant

You can enchant with blacksmith at each town. To enchant, you need Weapon Enchant Dust and Armour Enchant Dust with proper fees with item Lv. Attack and defence will increase with higher number of enchant and also effect will be added. Higher number of enchant, more effective however, lower the success rate. When you failed the enchant, with certain percentage, item maybe wrecked. Good Luck!
I want to know how to equip the achievement.

Records that you accomplished during the game, is Achievement. If you want to check Achievements, you can find it in the BOOK (Hot key J). You can get medals when you accomplish the achievement. You also can use it from achievement page. When you equip the medal, a title will be shown above the character and some stats are also increased.
Tell me about Class Promotion

Heroes can promote their class when they reach Lv20. In order to do class promotion, you should go Port of Winds, the capital of continent of wind. You can find Warrior Class Master Evan, Archer Class Master Rony, Magician Class Master Edeline, and Thief Class Master Cyndi at Port of Winds. When you meet one of them, they will test you whether you are qualified or not. If you pass it, you will be stronger than before.
Tell me how to use Cash Shop.

There are many kinds of useful things in Cash Shop. Heroes can level up faster using EXP potion, safer hunting with special potion. Or you can customize your character. You can get into Cash Shop click the Cash Shop button, in order to buy Cash Item, press top up the cash at the bottom right.
What's Resting Bonus EXP?

When you enter the map which has blessed from the artifact, you can get the resting bonus EXP. At the moment, you can only get at Port of Winds due to Water Artifact. You also can get bonus EXP when you log out at this place. It does not affect to the quest EXP. You only can consume it with hunting. You will get 1.5 times EXP when you have resting bonus EXP. When you used all of bonus EXP, gained EXP will be back to normal.
Tournament? Tell me about Emporia.

The guild which won the tournament will get the Emporia. You can use the portal which is right side of Guild Manager Dony at Port of Winds. The guild which possessed the Emporia, can locate some structures below. [Tier 1] Guild Soul Craft: Soul Craft success rate increase 2% Replenish Fountain: HP 1000, MP 1000 will be increased by 2 hours. Capsule incubator: you can get Rejuvenation Capsule, Invincibility Capsule and Skill Point Capsule once in a day. [Tier 2] Replenish Fountain: HP 1000, MP 1000 will be increased by 2 hours. Capsule incubator: you can get Rejuvenation Capsule, Invincibility Capsule and Skill Point Capsule once in a day. Better Blacksmith: Enchant rate increase 2%

I cleared Mission Mode. How can I get higher Rank?
What is Hidden dungeon? Tell me how to go there.

When you finish the Mission Mode, you will see the Rank, you also can see the Rank in real time at under-right in the screen. There is a criterion for the Rank. [Sense] Sense gauge will fill up when normal, skill attack happens. When the character hit from monster or cannot be moved, gauge will decrease. [Ability] Ability gauge will fill up with skill attack. (like Sense gauge, it's only affects to individual.)

If you defeat the boss in mission mode F4, you have a chance to receive a hidden map scroll. Monsters in hidden maps are stronger than normal field monsters, but you also get better EXP.
Hidden maps open 1 hour from a fixed time and will be closed after a certain time. You will get more information about the open and close time when you use the scroll. You can move to hidden map if you click the scroll.
You can expect many nice items at hidden map. You won't regret the effort. Just try!

You can entered only if you've had a quest which is related to the temple of water. The name of the first quest for the temple of water: Looking for a great hero. (Check your Journal - Quest - Main Quests for details)

Advantages of Guild

Do you want to know about an advantage of guild? People will not come to your guild automatically. Guild member will be increased, if there will be some advantages out there?%% Do you want to know an advantage of guild in detail?
Guild level upgrade
Guild level will upgrade through guild quest only. Try to focus on to make your guild member confident to fight, Then you will get enough rewards from me.
Guild Skill
If you created a guild, all guild member can use guild skill. This guild skill will be increased upon the result of guild level.
Emporia Participation
Emporia is the area which is under controlled by a winning guild in guild tournament. From guild level 2 will be joined and you can establish

Can I get if by producing items?

You can make items through its recipe. It's success rate, items, cost will be all different depend of how you make them. Right-Click recipe at your inventory to activate production UI of item.
You can simply make items by pressing Make or Combination button with adequate ingredients. You will see information system message for both Success and Failure.
You can protect your recipe with insurance scroll, you can increase success rate with rate increasing items. Try item production today and have fun!

Name : Rudolph Because of people's complaint that they have never had a white Christmas before, Rudolph made special snow crystal to make it snow... However, he lost all of his crystal during his trip to town, so he really worries about.
Return MyHome APT

If you don't want to use APT any more, just request me to take it back. But in that case, you must not have any late fees. %% Oh, and if you return the home, I will send your furniture through mail, but, %% WallPaper, Floor tile, Home size increase items are not refundable. Also, your guest book and guest history will be deleted too. Please think twice before you return, OK?

Spirit Shards can be obtained in this Dungeon. Monsters from four different paths (Ice, Fire, Dark and Nature) drop the different Spirit Shards. You must be over Lv.40 and in possession of a Spiritual Protection Stone to enter the dungeon.
How to enter the dungeon: 1. Required item : 'Spiritual Protection Stone' 2. To obtain the item: 1) Complete the daily quest 'Spiritual Protection' from Gwen of Kazeura. 2) Upon completing the quest will be given four 'Spiritual Protection Stones'. Each time you enter the dungeon, it will consume one stone. If a party is entering the dungeon it will only consume the party leader's 'stone'. 3) 'Spiritual Protection Stones' are not tradable. 3. Different levels 1) There are three difficulty levels for this dungeon. Normal/Advanced and Rare. Users are able to choose one of them. 2) In order to enter the Advanced/Rare dungeons the appropriate medallions are needed. 3) You can exchange medallions from Gwen. Remember though, Gwen will ask for specific items! 4) Spirit weapons are only obtainable in the Rare dungeon.

Extract elements from the Spirit Shards obtained in the Guardians' Dungeon using the Extract button in your inventory. Trade the elements for a Box of Spirits with Gwen by asking her to 'Swap Spirit Box'. Open up the box and you will earn one of many different levels of socket cards. If you wish to earn a higher level card, you can earn higher level cards by asking Gwen to 'Swap Socket Card' and exchanging multiple lower level cards with her for a higher level card. Socket cards can be applied to weapon and armor sockets. Once applied, the equipment will contain those elements and will recieve their relative stat bonuses. Many elements can be applied to a single piece of equipment.

There are no strong people to fight around here. I can fight anyone.
I was always taught, no pain no gain. You must practice for what you want to achieve.
Until we get back the Precious treasure, we will bare all this trouble.
We can cooperate with the humans, if we can get back the Precious Treasure.
Don't try to talk to me. I have my pride being a Drakan.
What a shame. I can't believe we lost Precious treasure.
What. You think I'm ugly? I think you are uglier.
Hello. I'm Vincent, the butler that serves the Sovereign.
Welcome to Port of the Winds.
Being a citizen of Port of the Winds you should take your pride in protecting your city.
Young bloods. It is time to show your power!
A number of different problems have broken out. We need your help.
Join the Dragon Fellowship! Dragotaka needs you.
For those who have passion and love for our world, join me in fighting the enemy.
Come! Come! I have everything you want!
Wait! I do not feel good today.. Here! This is very good item, even by my standards.
Hmm... I wonder what this tastes like? Oh.. This tastes good. Here why don't you buy one!
Hello. I am training to become a warrior.
I will try my best to become the best warrior.
I want to become someone who's strong enough to help other people.
Hur, hur.. So.. What can I help you with?
My back hurts these days. But when I was in your age...
Give it to me! I will make it look like new again!
Hm.. Those pirates are causing me a headache. They keep coming and demand so many different things!
In the old days, when I was training hard, I would have taught them a lesson.
The pirates come from no where.
There are many people who have been injured by them.
It seems that Davy is being threatened.
Welcome. This is the best shop in Port of the Winds!
It's not easy to go to my hometown because of all these pirates.
The best equipment and weapons for facing pirates are all here!
Welcome! I will help you with your purchase!
My worst fear is, what would happen if the pirates attack the bank?
Working in the bank is very boring, so I dream up many ideas.
Here are many cute pets! Would you like one?
Many pets are being neglected, so I am try to watch out for stray pets.
I've heard there are many great fishing baits in the Temple of Water.
I want to become a better at fishing than Ersil!
Do you know of any special fishing baits? I have to beat Ersil!
The house prices around here are dropping because of those pirates.
Hey! Don't you want to show off your MyHome? Ask anything you want to know.
When there is a special event, it will be Gatto's job-eaow.
Looky here! Looky there! There are tasty fishes everywhereow!
I am couple manager Jodie. My job is to make sure every couple is happy!
If you are tired of travelling alone, I will find a couple for you!
Marriage will save anyone who is lonely.
You wish to make a guild? I'll just need a minute.
There are some things which can only be done by guilds.
If you want to create a guild and promote friendship, come to me.
Do you want to learn a production profession? Good, I will teach you everything.
If you want to become a production expert, you can learn everything from me.
If you're going to visit a Temple or the Underground Graveyard you better be prepared.
Frank is trying to raise the price of the items I'm providing. You have to be honest, I must tell him not to!
When I was young, I explored many dangerous places, but none as dangerous as now.
So you wish to explore the temple near here? Then you better get prepared.
I think those monsters in the Temple make fun of me. One day I will teach them a lesson.
Something strange is happening in our quiet village.
You better not go anywhere near Underground Graveyard. There were a couple who went in and came back crawling.
There is a strong seal around the Underground Graveyard, so the monsters cannot come out. But I don't think the seal will stand forever.
Recently, I sleep a lot. I do now know how long I have to live this boring life.
We cannot leave Moonlight Shore Village until this mess is cleared up.
I went to Skippy Sanctuary. There were many scary monsters there. It's best to not go there.
If you do not start saving now, you won't be able to get a house of your own.
Moonlight Shore Village is surrounded by beautiful sanctuaries. Problem is they are full of dangerous monsters.
I heard there was someone strong at the Moonlight Shore Village. I am disappointed because I do not see anyone who is strong.
I've heard someone has come back from the past! I want to fight them.
I heard somewhere here, there is a Precious Treasure. I can feel something special.
If you find anything about the Precious Treasure, do tell me.
Underground Graveyard?! I feel something evil coming from that place, you should try and avoid it!
Oh dear, the visitors to the temple are declining, this is bad.. It must be because of all the monsters around the village.
Have you been to the Underground Graveyard? It's full of monsters!
It's hard to make friends with Graveyard Keeper Larell. There's something about his demeanor.
There are rumours spreading about a Witch appearing around the village. Please be careful.
I've heard there are many ingredients available to make a great dish. When I find them, I'll let you taste them.
Welcome. I am Sophia. I work for the Moonlight Shore Village Bank!
If you wish to deposit any items, consider using our bank.
Moonlight Shore Village is always full of people wanting to visit temples.
You're here for the temple? Then visit my shop! You won't regret it.
I'm worried that the number of visitors have declined. There monsters have become violent.
I wish to increase the price, but Smith woldn't like that.
I've heard there is lost of treasure within the temple.
If you have any new information regarding the temple you must tell me!

Hmm... You're here to trade something? I am worried that many people do not think much of production.%% Production will not only make you stronger, but also give you many items that will help you on your journey.%% Don't think of production as a waste of time, but as preparation for a safer journey.

It has been 10 years since I became an apprentice of Merchant Bessie.%% At first I thought production was a waste of time, but as my skill increased I began to think of it as an important skill also.%% Merchant Bessie will exchange any items that have been obtained during production, so if you have any useless items you can take them to her.

Hmm.. You are also here to learn of the joys of production? It's not easy.%% I started because granny Bessie made me learn them, but now I find it quite enjoyable.%% The good thing about production is the more time you spend, the better the things you will get.%% So instead of blaming your low skill, how about you actually spend some time and effort?

Oh. Welcome. You are here to become a cooking expert?%% I used to be a soldier working directly under a general. I have tasted many different dishes in many different places, and I realised my talent.%% I find cooking very exciting and love brining joy to so many people.%% If you wish to become a cook, I am willing to teach you.
What is instant processing?

Instant Processing is used to exchange items into different items which are more useful. [Instant Cooking] makes recovery items, [Simple Crafting] makes items which help with attack and defence, and [Extract Magical Force] creates element items.%% To learn different skills please speak with Brutus, Darwin or Julie in Odelia. After you learn the skill, double click on the ingredient items, and you will get a gauge.%% To obtain a best items, you need to click the gauge when it's right in the centre, keep trying to hit the centre!
I can't go back yet. I still have things to do. I'm not leaving until it's done.
Further down this path is Parmir Sanctuary. It's very dangerous there, I think you should head back to the village.
If you really want to lose weight then you need to exercise! Just going on a diet never works....
It's probably best if you just ignore this citadel. There are rumours a scary witch lives in here.
Pst! I heard there's a treasure nearby, but it's dangerous.
If you have any sense you should head back. If you carry on, you'll be in great danger.
Why are you here? Go back! For your own good, it's not safre!
I hope you're not thinking about entering the citadel. I don't know how strong you are but this place is extremely dangerous.
How strong are you? I need someone who can watch my back inside the citadel!
Please..It's very dangerous. It's not too late, go back!
I've tried to go to the next floor, but its too risky to continue.
I head there is treasure around here somewhere. I will try to get higher and catch up with Jack. Hehe.
The treasure is mine! You're not after the treasure are you? If you touch my treasure, I will not forgive you.
I am waiting for Jess. What is taking so long?!
Hey! Have you seen Jess? Man, he is nothing but trouble...
The citadel is really tall! I have a fear of heights! I must remember to not look down.
Finally, I'm at the top.. But oh boy.. I need to watch my step!
You made it! You're strong.
There is the witch right in-front of us. Do you think I could defeat her with my magic?
A human dares to talk to me? How reckless, you're just asking to be punished?!
Where is the precious treasure? I just want to find it and go home.
Hey! Stop looking at me like that. You look just as strange to me!
Hello! How much would you like to deposit today?
Beware of phishing. GMs will never ask for your personal details or passwords.
Keep your password safe! GMs will never ask for your personal details or passwords.
I dream to see the world in peace. Just once... before I die.
What is happening to this world... I miss the times of peace.
Look at my wrinkles! There are so many! They will be gone when my mind is at peace.
Dear Hero, I have complete faith in you to solve the problems in our village.
General Blood's things are appearing everything, I have a strange feeling about it.
When did this all begin? The world became like this... We are waiting for a hero who can defeat Elga.
What would you like to know?
Farrell was a really good friend to me. I have no idea what has happened to him.
Scientists have loyalties, but science itself does not... Do you understand?
Can you help me? I guess I can't make money by just waiting...
You need money to make money, and money makes money. It's all about the money.
Saving a gold is the same as earning a gold!
You will help me? Thank you so much!
When will the world be peaceful again? When it is, I will return to my hometown and live a quiet life.
Today training, tomorrow training. Training all the time...I'm so tired.
What can I get you?
A pet will love you, as much as you love the pet.
Pets are really cute, don't you think?
Are you here to repair a weapon?
I am the Master Craftsman, I will not back down if I think it's the right way! No matter what danger lies ahead of me, I will not hide!
What can I help you with?
Hello! Have a look at my equipment items! All weapons and armour come with a discount!
I have to keep smiling to attract customers! S--m--i--l--e!
Come this way! I will help you!
I am Julie! Grand daughter of James Brown. I will do my best to look after his shop while he's gone!
Don't tease me, I am not a child!
What are you looking for? A potion?
Potions, potions, get your potions! If your Grandpa drinks this potion he will become younger! Stronger! And Faster!
Potions, potions, get your potions! If your Grandma drinks this potion she will become younger, with beautiful soft skin!
This atomiser is very special and valuable.
Today is my cleaning day! Dusting, washing up, tidying! It's going to be a busy day!
Today is such a beautiful day. Perfect for hanging out the laundry!
Many people have been to the gorge but have never come back! Be careful.
Attention! No problem! I will be on guard!
The enemy are getting stronger, I should train hard!
Hey! This place is very dangerous. I am noble, but enjoy a good thrill. This is the life!
I cannot see any treasure. I thought there would be some.
It's very hot! Must be the weather because this coat isn't very thick. Phew it's boiling.
You're here to get your weapon repaired? What did you do to it!!! Leave it with me and come back later, I can't concentrate if you're looking at me.
It's not easy repairing weapons here with the heat. I'll be ok though, since I'm a pro.
What potion are you looking for? Buying them in bulk is much cheaper! Don't ask me why!
Everyone who visits my shop say's these are the best potions around! I drink them sometimes, they taste great! Oh, and they work well too!
The heat doesn't really effect me, I guess I'm just naturally cool. That's why I'm here working.
What is the problem? I will kick you out if you cause any trouble.
Dragotaka should be returned to peace soon. We are all waiting for brave hero!
There is no safe place? I am in charge here, you can rest without fear!
Wow, a human! Sniff, sniff, you smell like a criminal!
The criminal is somewhere around here. Huh? I am the only one around here! I must have been mistaken.
I am looking for some evidence. I'll have to look for it somewhere else.
If you're here, you must be pretty strong. It's not easy to get here.
I am hungry, so I'm off to go hunting.
Don't try to find out who I am. You will learn one day, if you continue on the path you are taking.
I am very thick skinned, so I don't feel this cold weather.
Welcome to Kazuera Village. I am Bybay, I protect this village.
Whatver is the matter? You don't need to shout! I have big ears, so I can hear you well.
I was born with this thick skin. It's much stronger than any human skin, but it's very dry. I need to keep moisturising.
Drakan and humans have started to work together. I think together we can defeat Elga and get the Precious Treasure back.
When I get older, I will save the word... Just you watch!
My sister is working for the priest, she's so busy these days. We can't even play together anymore.
I'm growing this Dragon, what do you think?
What can I help you with?
My brother is called Oulu. He is causing a lot of trouble around here, I do wrry about him.
This doll was given to me by Oulu. It's cute right?
Hello, I will try my best to assist you. What can I do you for?
Welcome! I am the master Soul Crafter. Call me Ratai.
Can I help you? I'll try my best!
You can improve your items grade by Soul Crafting.
What would you like to deposit? I am here to help.
Kazeura Village is always prepared for battle!
Wow! How did you know! Come and looka t it closer, this is very good equipment!
Come and take a look at our weapons, there is a weapon and a price for everyone!
I've made a profit today! Soon I will be rich!
Do you know what CP is?
Where are all the brave and strong warriors these days? No one looks that special anymore.
Everyone looks so weak. One punch would be enough. Do you want to test my punch?
I am older than you! Show some respect!
The situation here is getting worse! What are you doing about it?! Are you going to just sit there?
While they still have the Precious Treasure I won't be able to sleep well. We must get that Precious Treasure back quickly!
What is it you want to tell me? Cough cough
Are you on the good side? Evil side? Is evil good? Is good evil? Cough cough, do not trust anything young one.
What is wrong kid?
Hmm, this is the worst thing that has happened since our records began.
This is our final hope to defeat the Black Witch and Elga. Difficult, but it's the only way.
Tell me your problems.
When a summoner becomes a Priest of the Earth, they will return us from darkness into the light.
Yes? What? Do you want to become the Priest of the Earth?
Do you see my daughter Tatanka? I am very proud of her.
This hammering is hard work! You will be strong steel!
Hey stop distracting me! I am not just simply hammering. I have to focus all of my attention on this!
What? You're here to repair your weapon?
Do you know how hard it is to make a good weapon? Small distractions can make the weapon useless. I need to concentrate.
My father doesn't think I am good enough, but I love making weapons. I always try my best, but learn new things everyday.
What's wrong? Hmm..
Have you heard of the legend that the hero who defeated Elga used some special magic?
Stay away from the Guardian's Dungeon, that place is fraught with danger. You won't see me anywhere near there.
I am Royal Guard Ranotah! As you can see, I'm a good fighter. What's wrong?
We are not sure what happened to Akanai. Where is it hiding?
Priest Ochukoe is really great. He is not one to worry about what might be, but takes care of problems swiftly and properly.
Cough cough, what can I help you with?
We need a hero who can defeat Akanai. Are there any heroes around? Oh!! My back...If it wasn't for my back, I would defeat Akanai myself.
Why did you call me? I am very busy.
The situation is getting worse and worse. I need to do something!
How can I help you? Take a look around, everything must go!
I have potions for everything! You can even improve your luck! Take a look!
The monsters here are really scary. You better be prepared.
How many would you like? Come on! Buy some more! Hehe.
Sales are not so good these days. I hope Asta is doing well.
Welcome, Welcome! Come and get some potions! They're so cheap I'm practically giving them away!
What's wrong? Hmm..
I have no time. Hmm..
If Elga destroys the world tomorrow, I will still plant an apple tree.
Anyone who does not know the importance of trees is stupid! Pencils, paper, it's all made from trees!
You dare to speak to me? Ha!
There! Am I not cool?
I am the best! I am perfect! Others will try and follow me, like Kunterran.
Do you need your weapon repaired? What's your problem?
Love the forst and love animals, that’s our tribes way.
The animals around here have changed. A long time ago we lived happily together, but now there there is nothing we can do.
Will you help me? That's good to hear! I have been fighting here alone for 3 days. Non stop!
Monsters keep coming and comping... Wow.. I'm so tired.
A long time ago we used to live with the animals. These days we're too busy fighting the animals. I miss the old days.
Yes? What can I do to help you? Or.. Are you here to help me?
I..I cannot see anything.
I lost my ability to see the future. I can't see anything now. I need to regain my strength.
What do you need? Why did you call me?
Why do we get treated like a cult? We love the forst and nature! Tsk.
We need to go to God's Sanctuary, but we're in trouble. Our priest has lost the ability to see the future.
Who are you? Why are you taking to me?
Huff, Puff, what is this 'Dragon Fellowship'? Can I eat it?
Hey! You there! Stranger!
Forest Spirits have started to attach us. Now not even the forst is safe.
I pray for help, please listen to us.
Come closer.
I'm not sure what's going on these days. Why is it so hard to live an ordinary, simple life...
I wonder where the hero who can defeat Elga is now.
Yeah? What is it. Shoot!
Humans are making trouble all the time. And here we go again...
If you're rude to Hel Krouzer you will be sorry. So watch your mouth!
Hero. You look anxious, share your concerns with me.
I have super long legs. I'm undoubtedly the most attractive guy in the village.
I an amazing aim with a bow and arrow, and you can't imagine how fast I can run.
I know!! There is a criminal among us! Wait... There are only two of us here? Then, who will be the criminal?
My glasses are not just made to give me better vision. I can start a fire with them!
Although it's called God's Sanctuary, it's not a sanctuary for me. I'm too busy and tired these days.
Hey. What brought you here?
Kayron Altar is certainly not a peaceful place. I have heard stories of many monsters wandering around the Altar.
You should talk to Hel Krouzer. He will give you some good advice.
Hey. You remember my name? Yeah I am Erynden, Haha!
Archers are cool, we're fast, accurate and good looking! Haha.
Don't you want to be an archer? I will teach you.
What is it you want?
It's time to train! I shall become stronger today, and even stronger tomorrow!
Who is the strongest in Fungoid Village? I hope I can find the someone to compete with.
Vartika Hill is on your right and Blizzard Ridge is down there.
Good evening. I am Sanson, Fungoid Village's Blacksmith.
You've come to listen to my lecture?
We've gone past the point of just physical fighting... It's time to use the power of science!
Science is unique and powerful. I believe it can explain everything in the world around us.
Need a room?
You don't have to keep looking. My Inn has the best rooms in the village!
How may I help you?
The weather is gloomy, and so is my mood.
Thank you for coming.
Hey, what are you up to?
Welcome to Fungoid Village. I'm not quite sure why it's called Fungoid... Anyway..You're at Fungoid Village.
You're going to need a good weapon.
There are dangerous monsters roaming around here. You're going to need some good equipment to protect yourself.
How do you become a successful merchant? Firstly, smily. Secondly, smile, and and don't forget to smile! Haha.
I am master Summoner Bartie. What do you want?
I wonder what Lavalon is after.
Have you heard of the legend of the four heroes? You might find out some more about them at the Altar of Time.
Yes? You can to learn some fungoid magic? You can make a real mushroom! It's the best magic!
Have you noticed my heart shaped lips? They're really cute. See?
Don't treat me like a baby!
Yup? You want to learn my magic?
Don't go to the Ruined Mushroom Factory. The monsters there are immune to my magic!
The village is no longer a place of peace and beauty. Sigh.
I am Duke Monadron, I love to collect treasure.
I was told there are many unique treasures in Fungoid Village, but I only see a ruined factory and stupid monsters.
Do you see my huge diamond ring? You can't imagine how expensive it is! Only rich people like me can afford such nice things.
I can feel the power of the hero within you.
I wonder why the Fungoid Village has changed so much. It's no longer safe anywhere in the village.
Be careful if you're planning to travel though Frigid Canyon, I almost got killed there once!
Yo! So? Spit it out!
Thieves are supposed to be faster than anyone!
Yes, pink is my favourite colour! What...why are you laughing? Who said pink is not a good colour for a theif?
Welcome. How may I help you?
Hi there! Beware, monsters may ambush us at any minute.
Being a Guard can be dangerous. But I am happy to protect Fungoid Village.
I am proud to be a guard. I am protecting my dear family and friends.
I am Fungoid Chief Masiroon. What has brought you to Fungoid Village?
Yes? Are you looking for something special?
If you want to make a good investment, try to buy something before it becomes popular.

Fungoid Village is a land of opportunity. The mushrooms here are an important healthy food and are will be super popular in the market! I think everyone will eat mushrooms soon. Wait...I'm hungry now...
I'm all alone here. Everyone has gone to a safer location.
Look closer....closer....and closer.
I want to go closer, but I don't think it's safe to.
Are you looking for something in-particular?
I wish I opened my store in a major town. Then I would have made lots of gold!
Hello, may I suggest you buy some potions before you enter.
Woohoo. Yoohoo. Googoo. Woohoohoo!
Woohoo woohoohoo!
You can't earn power for free. You will have to prove your worthy of that power.
Now I only need a Bone from the Bone Dragon.
Hello, do you wish to learn your fortune?
Ah....yes..yes...I can see your future...
I'd like to go further, but it's too dangerous.
Many dangerous monsters live in Frigid Canyon. I'm just a Forest Fairy and there's nothing I can do!
Oh....Hero! Please help me.
What do you want?
I came all the way up here to sell many items. I don't think you would want to miss this great opportunuity to stock up!
Whoa, it was a long day getting all the way up here. Take a look! I have loads of good things to sell.
Hello friend.
Studying is not bad, but I think travelling can teach you something special.
I have travelled all over the world. I have seen and experienced many good things.
I was expecting you.
Life is unpredictable. Some say this is why life is fun, but I feel sorry that I cannot predict the future since the world fell into chaos.
So it's the Black Witch who caused all of this misery..?
Yea? You wanted to talk to me?
Banshi Gorge is like a maze. I almost got lost in there!
Potions are on sale. Special potions from the Mika Tribe on sale! Hey! You there, need any potions?
My arrow won't miss the enemy.
So, some people never came back from Red Fox Delta. It's all because of the Metal Harpy from the Sky Stairs?
Good to see you again here, eh?
Ah, what is so special about Banshi Gorge? There's no treasure, it's so boring here.
Ha! Because there are guards standing by, you think I can't steal the treasure? Just wait and you'll see what I can do.
Need help?
It's easy to destroy but hard to recover.
There's an Mysterious Hunter up there. I wonder what she's up to.
When you face a hardship, the heroes will come and support you.
You can find a Mysterious Hunter up there. Nobody knows who she is.
You! Yes you there! Come over here.
I support Hel Krouzer. I have much respect for him.
You will have to head to Red Fox Delta. There, you may find what you are looking for.
If you're going to help me, then what are you waiting for?!
I need to complete this task and get back to Port of the Winds as soon as possible.
I still have tasks left to complete. If you bump into anyone looking for me, tell them I'm busy.
It is you again.
The Village of Ash Mist is on your right.
There is a rumor that some unique treasure is hidden in Red Fox Delta.
You came for my special potions, eh? Come and see.
VanCliff Fortress, Snowy Graveyard and Rancorous Forest...they're all dangerous places. You should probably fill up your inventory with potions.
You're heading to VanCliff Fortress? I think you should change your mind, but if you must go, then at least buy a load of potions!
See my muscles? Spectacular eh? Look at my arms! Hahaha.
Come and get your equipment repaired! You never know when you might bump into some monsters.
Every night I lose some livestock! Do you think there is a vampire wandering around at night?
You've come to hunt?
There's some strange rumors spreading around here.
I've come to capture vampires, if there are any.
How can I help you?
Don't get too close to the Fortress, if you want to live.
You want to become a successful merchant? Then keep smiling!
What would you like to know first?
Eureka! I've finally found it!
Hey, isn't it time for your third job promotion?
Hey you there. Want to go and steal something with me?
Well, what you do want?
Don't become a slave to gold.
Don't waste a gold, and you save a gold!
I don't want to suggest to enter Van Cliff Fortress.
My glasses? My glasses are not just typical glasses. If you do me a favour, I shall reveal their secret.
So, what is it you're after?
Nobody knows about any treasures around here. Am I in the wrong place?
Why did I come all the way up here...
Is there anybody around? Hey, you have to hear this!
I think we will need to save this village quickly! Things are deteriorating fast.
Oh? What are you interested in? Please, feel free to ask me!
Welcome to the Village of Ash Mist. It is too bad the village is in chaos now.
Se, I meet you here again. Does this mean I can rely on you?
Haven of Peace is straight forward.
The village is being devastated. We need a hero.
Come here and get your equipment repaired.
Of course you have to have your equipment in tip-top condition if you want to live a safe and long life, especially if you're in Snowy Graveyard.
Hahaha. I am the super cooool Blacksmith Pollack. I can repair anything.
What kind of potion would you like? I have red, blue and more! So let me know what you want!
Ah, so you are the rising star in the Dragon Fellowship. You look different to what I was expecting. Please go and meet Blair, he is our captain.
Hello? Hello? Hey! You should at least smile!
Yea? You wanted to talk to me?
You seem to be quite famous. You're gonna be a super hero one day!
Chaser's Ridge, Ice Rock Hill and Haven of Peace are on the right!
Ah, please come and work with us.
The world is in chaos? Something happened? Please tell us.
Snow Fox tribe is the best. Well will dominate the world!
I need to talk to you.
This is a lonely place, nothing much to do... I'm tired of my job, it's just plain boring and my boss said... ... ... ... Hey, are you listening to me?
Ah it has been a long time since anyone's spoken to me. I'm actually very shy, but since I have no one to talk to, I think I'm becoming a chatterbox! Have you heard of....blah blah blah..
Have you come to hear my preditions?
I had a very disturbing dream. I hope it was just a dream.
What would you like to know?
I think our god, eia, is not listening to me anymore. The world is getting more and more chaotic.
Watch out! Do you not know this place isn't safe?
Calm seas do not create a great boatman.
I don't think any hunter can be greater than Parmir. If there is one, then it should be me!
Need repairs?
Not many customers come here these days...sigh...
Welcome to Dragon Valley. Haha. I am sorry, but this place is as dangerous as Pine Cone Hills.
Yes? Shoot!
I have no idea why Kunteran sent me here.
You want to say something?
Can I meet the Black Dragon if I go beyond the Black Claw Nest Outpot? Ah, I'm just excited!
Heading to Black Claw Nest Outpost? You have to be extra careful. It's not just a dangerous place. It's the most dangerous!
How may I help you?
If you need something in-particular, please feel free to ask!
I have delicious potions on sale! Come buy some!
Please save Dragotaka!
There was once a brave Hero who saved the world. It's a shame for us that we can't do it.
Please think carefully.
Can you do it?
Once you enter, I don't think you can come back.
Why don't you go back. It's not like you can just go peek-a-boo!
Do you need repairs?
So. You've decided to enter?
Come. I shall repair your equipment.
Hello. If there's anything I can help with, please let me know.
Try Soul Crafting your equipment. You can enhance it's grade!
What can I do for you? I am Ratai, the master Soul Crafter.
Are you talking to me?
Is Elga inside?
Ah...I'm just scared just looking a the entrance!
I'm counting on you..
One person can put the world into chaos. But it takes thousands of heroes to bring the world pack to peace.
It will be a long journey to defeat Elga. It once seemed an endless quest, but now I think we can see its end.
What do you want to say?
You should watch carefully when you pass Marshmallow Valley.
There are two roads in Marshmallow Valley. You will have to look carefully.
You came all the way up here? Amazing! Haha.
I think we are getting closer.
The monsters here are quite fast. I need to use my full concentration to stay alive.
Did you come to get a shot?
When you catch a cold, please stop by and talk to me! Hoho..
I'm the world's best nurse, Mimi. Nice to meet you. Hehe.
Nice to see you.
When you go to the east side of the camp, you'll see the Drakos Dungeon.
Welcome to Ellora Camp.
I wasn't wrong.
I'm impressed, it must not have been easy to get here.
What do you want from me?
There is a story that in the past, some of our tribe when in there, but not one of them came back. You should be more careful, if you don't want to be like them.
Don't dare to think you can go inside the dungeon alone.
You think you can go into Drakos alone? Hahaha.
I wonder, how so many people in Ellora Camp don't know how dangerous this place really is?
It's just too scary for me to stand here. My legs are shaking! Whoa!
The real estate prices here don't seem to increase much. As an expert of real estate, investing here is too risky!
Hey! Don't you want to show off your MyHome? Ask anything you want to know.
For Dragotaka! For Glory!
For Dragotaka! For Glory!
For Dragotaka! For Glory!
For Dragotaka! For Glory!
For Dragotaka! For Glory!
For Dragotaka! For Glory!
You've finally arrived here. You must make up your mind!
Drakon is a incredibly huge dungeon with 50 floors! I've heard that you can get great rewards from inside.
As far as I've heard, no one has ever come back alive from Drakos. You're not going inside are you?
Can I help you?
I have seen heroes who bought amazing weapons to go to Drakos, but I've never seen anyone selling their weapons once they get back. I'd never go to Drakos.
I've gained quite a bit of gold from the heroes who dare to go inside Drakos.
Is it just me or does it stink of gold around here? Don't you dare take any! It's mine!
There is definitely treasure in Drakos. I can feel it. Smells like gold.
Did you come here to repair your wepaon? If not, could you do me a favour?
Do you know what it's like to be a noble blacksmith?
I'm professional, I won't go against my ethics and belief! That's what I do! I would face any kind of thread. That's who I am!
What do you want? I'm kind of busy.
We can't fall back. The enemy is right in front of us. If there's anyone who's afraid of what we need to deal with, they should just go home right now.
Are you ready for Drakos? Soldiers! We're heroes, we don't fail, the best in the century! Follow my lead, my soldiers!
Long time no see. What made you come here?
I heard that even the first floor of Drakos isn't easy.
What can I do for you?
There seems to be many monsters with magic! You'd better watch out for curses they can place on you! Be careful.
It would be impossible to get through Drakos alone. You've got to have strong friends willing to help each other.
Is there anything I can help you with?
Be careful. I've heard there are many dangerous monsters.
Mirinae Sanctuary has been created to remember one of the four legendary heroes.
Did you call me? What would you like?
People are gathering around and living here? I don't believe it. I can't live here any longer, I don't have anything special here.
There wouldn't be any chance we could find treasure in this cave could we? I don't even know what I came here.
What's wrong?
There are many strange monsters in Dangerous Caverns. I wonder who made all those mutants...
Welcome to Dangerous Caverns!
What can I grab for you?
It's cheap. Don't you miss this limited time offer!
In my opinion, potions are a must have in Dangerous Caverns.
This is too dark...I've got to deliver these supplies...
Ah...I was on my way to deliver supplies when someone attacked me...
Oh, are you giving me your friend's treasure or what?
I can take care of any opponent with just one punch!
I wonder what kind of adventure will be waiting for me in Dangerous Caverns. Teeheehee.. This is the pirate's spirit!
Try Soul Crafting your equipment. You can enhance it's grade!
Any weapon can be repaired almost immediately. Just hold on a minute.
I'm a very skillful person, I'm great at repairing weapons.
Who are you? Please help me.
I... I want to go home... Is it too late?
Ah...arg...It hurts. I ca..cannot move.
Who are you? Were you looking for me?
I think my beard is burning...
I'ts burning furiously because it's so hot! I can't take a break though, I have a goal to reach.
What's the matter?
Are you going inside? Please take care.
It's been a while since I've seen anyone here. No one's tried to come to this hot place.
Who are you, did you call for me?
I wish I could get the stolen mine back. What shall I do? I can't defeat any monsters, I'm just a simple miner.
Time has been flying since I became a miner. I can't even count how many years have passes. I was really proud of being a miner, but...
Are you going to help me?
I'm Detective Gordon. You've heard of me, right? What made me famous is the ability to see anything through this magnifying glass.
When I start work on a case, it's just a matter of time before I catch the criminal. This one will be exactly the same.
Just remember what I told you.
I've seen many vampires, but I've never seen any witches. You've been misled, don't you think?
Are you ready?
We need as many people as we can rally to defeat Elga. There more people, the better. Gather members for our cause, as many as you can. 3 or 4 won’t be enough.

To create a fellowship you need to bring a Fellowship Medal! If you don't have enough to obtain a Fellowship Medal you can only be defeated. So...let me see the Fellowship Medal. I don't want to speak to all of you, just the party leader!
I'm all ears.
The heroes have finally arrived. I'm sorry that there's nothing we can do but watch all the heroes fighting out there.
It won't be possible to kill Elga without lots of preparation and a firm determination.
The whole Drakan tribe is depending on you.
This is our only chance. Please defeat Elga!
You finally made your move. I was expecting you here.
Why did you call for me?
You need to be careful, even in your first steps!
Sh...Show me what you can do.
Cheer up little hero!
Gather your courage and fight! But come back safely.
Elga's army won't be easy to defeat. They are all very strong.
I'll try my best to repair your equipment!
Wait! Wait! You should repair your armour and weapons before you go inside!
I'll repair the weapons with the skills passed down from my father. Just give me a moment.
I believe in you.
The Drakan are also trying hard to defeat the Black Dragon Lord Elga constantly!
Can we live in a peaceful world if we defeat Elga?
I'm counting on you..
What I've heard from people, Elga summons some kind of protection wall. When you fight Elga, you should be careful of it!
If you stand still when fighting Elga, you'll be in great danger. So keep moving!
Aren't you great.
You've finally come! I knew you'd make it.
You'd better make your move carefully, one step at a time.
I wish you luck!
You should check your weapons durability and take enough potions! Once you're inside, there's no going back.
Go in a win!
You're really awesome. I think I'm falling in love with you.
We're making a big step towards restoring peace to Dragotaka!
I'm surprised that there's a hero who can defeat the witch. I believe you could be the one who saves the world.
You're better than I expected! It's really surprising. The witch from Drakos has been defeated! I cannot believe my eyes.
As the Black Witch has gone, this place will return to peace.
I cannot believe that Drakos has become this peaceful place.
So you really killed the witch. I don’t suppose you saw any treasure?
I've got to find some treasure.
How high up is the top?
Don't talk to me, I've got to get down right now... It's not because I'm afraid of heights.
The witch is gone! All that's left to do is find some treasure. Hehe.
It's awesome! Is it true that the witch is really gone? I can't believe it!
Can I help you?
I just got word that something strange is going on at the Cookie Factory... Ah.. What is it this time.%% I will begin an investigation into this immediately!

The Cookie Factory has two buildings, the Master Chocolatier's House (F6) and the Chocolate Storehouse (F7) where the Chocolate Boxes are stored.%% You may enter the Cookie Factory at any time but you need an admission ticket to enter the Master Chocolatier's House (F6) or the Chocolate Storehouse (F7).

The Master Chocolatier's House is where the Gingerbread Man lives, it's the most important part of the Cookie Factory.%% I've been told his chocolate tastes different these days. I wonder if something's happened to him.%% An admission ticket is required to enter the Master Chocolatier's House (F6).

The Chocolate Storehouse is where all of the Chocolate Boxes are kept.%% Many of the boxes have been disappearing so we're conducting an investigation.%% An admission ticket is required to enter the Chocolate Storehouse (F7).
Who's caused this mess this time? Arg.
With over 30 years of experience working in this field, you could call me a professional detective.
About the Chocolatier's House (F6)
About the Storehouse (F7)

Good evening! My name is Yamaki, the General Manager of the Cookie Factory.%% The Cookie Factory is currently open to the public but you need an admission ticket to enter the Master Chocolatier's House (F6) or the Chocolate Storehouse (F7).
I understand you may be overwhelmed by this situation.%% Please keep in mind that you are the key to resolving the conflict between the humans and fungoids.

Darn it! Why do you keep stopping me? You think I'm stupid just because I've been dumped 10,000 times?%% Arf.. Men are all the same. They all say they like the good girl, but eventually fall for the pretty girl.%% I could stand being rejected 5000 times, but 10,000 times? This is rediculous! Valentines, to celebrate the love and affection between lovers? What good is it for?!%% The Gingerbread Man's Valentines chocolate makes me feel especially miserable. I feel so defeated!%% That's why I've created a plan, I will not let the Gingerbread Man make sweet chocolate! ...You can't stop me. I will give all of the valentines the Gingerbread Mans bitter chocolate.

Sob. Sob. This is a terrible valentines, just terrible and cruel...sob...sob... You can't do this to me. Arg!%% 100 years ago I asked a great wizard what I needed to do to become a wizard like him. He told me that if I lived alone for 100 years I could become a wise wizard.%% I was just a young innocent boy at the time, I patiently waited and waited, never dating anyone, to see if I would gain any magical powers through all those years.%% After 103 years of waiting I finally decided to try and contact the great wizard. Guess what? I met his granson who told me that the wizard had died.%% Can you believe it? The wizard had a wife and children! He tricked me!%% I'm just a heartbroken man now, I'm going to hurt all the happy lovers by stealing all their Chocolate Boxes.%% Don't try and stop me, nothing can heal my broken heart. Nothing can bring back my youth. I don't want anyone to have a sweet Valentine.
Some fresh ingredients truly make a great dish. You know what? I think a chef must know how to deal with all sorts of ingredients in order to cook a great dish.
The General I served got upset when he heard the news that I would be leaving to become a chef. Aye, Didn't he moan, 'You too, Brutus?'
It has been over 10 years since I started raising my two apprentices. I am more than happy to teach Jerome as he is a hard worker. Romy however is a tough case.
People come here from far and wide to become a Production Maestro without knowing how much effort is really needed to achieve that dream.
Some say plants don't have emotions. But when you take care of them gently you will see a remarkable difference.
Romy creeps me out, especially when she smirks holding that hammer in her hand.
Grandma Bessie sort of dragged me to this place to make me learn production skills. It has been like 10 years already! I'm going to run away.
Producing something means that you smash it first to create something new. Smash! Boom! Bang! Isn't it a nice sound?
You can enter this place upon accepting the quest Ghost disturbance at Culverts. Needed Quest : [Ghost disturbance at Culverts]
Did you see anyone from the other dimension? I heard that they're really funny looking.

Hey Victor! Have you heard of the parallel universe theory? According to the theory, there's someone who is exactly the same person as me but in a different dimension! I might even be a king called Steven Jr. in there!
Hey Victor! Have you heard? People in the other dimension have two mouths. Wouldn't it be so convenient eating something if we had two mouths!
To enter to the Geffen you need a special pass. Do you have one?
Oh Walter! don't you dream of such things. You must be just be a guard in the other dimension, and mad about that girl Amy. I can see that.
Walter! I'm sure of one thing! If you had two mouths I would've hit you so hard that I wouldnt understand your chatter anymore! I'm only being patient because you have one mouth right now.

Have you heard of the Ragnarök world? That's where I came from, through the eye of the dimension.%% But, it's not really easy to go back through because of Dimensional Resistances, people can only get there using special equipment.%% Also, to relieve the shock people ride Poring when they move to the other dimension.
To go to the Ragnarök world you should equip the Novice set.
Hey! Did you know we're recruiting heroes? Don't miss your chance! We're only recruiting 9,999 people on a first-come, first-served basis. Oh! We're almost closing the list so hurry up!
Like you have lovely animals called pet, we keep animals called Cuepet. They're so cute even when they bite my head.
Ah! I hope the crack in our dimension will disappear soon.%% If it disappears I think Deporte will also be relieved!
Welcome, did you know that there's a rumor that there are not many days left until the end of the world? No? Oh! Then keep it to yourself please.

In the Orc Field there is a custom that the heir leaves their outfit there. But I don't think that they would have left without any clothes on them. Anyways, whenever I need something to wear I sometimes go there and pick up an outfit or two.
Hmm.. I think the people in the other dimension are a bit weird. They turn their faces from me whenever i stare at them for too long. Ah! That's the same as people this dimension actually!

Hehe, even this world is full of sadness, but i bet we can find something that makes us laugh. For instance, your funny face talking to me!%% Did you know that in order to enter Glast Heim you require a Blue Gemstone?
Whenever I'm depressed or a bit down I try to laugh more. Smiling faces make people happy! But Deporte seems to get angry every time she sees my smiling face.
Deporte please don't get angry, it only seems to make wrinkles appear on your face! Smile like me instead! Hehe.
It's been 10 years since the crack in the dimension was found. Wow! Then how old is Deporte?
How did the crack in our dimension start to appear? It appeared right in front of my favorite bakery!%% I just can't stand it, I have to know why! Ha.. it has given me a headache already!
Binit, do you know why I got another wrinkle on my face? It's you! Your smiling face! So can you just take your face away from me before i become one giant wrinkle?
Binit! You just stay there and don't do anything. I just want to take my shoes off!
It's not difficult to get Glast Heim. You just take the portal I've created. But you should know it's not a free ride!%% Don't you even think about stealing a ride! I won't let that happen!
Why! Why should I work on making ward in this kind of a place. I shouldn't have believed Aele and started to work illegally in this part-time job in Prontera.

It's known that Glast Heim contains the Valkyrie's legacy. In the past, there were many explorers looking for it, but many of them just stopped coming here after crack in our dimension appeared. Please, just let me enjoy this peaceful moment.

10 years ago in Geffen a mysterious energy bathe in red light appeared through the other dimension from the sky.%% However, No one was interested in this mysterious energy except doctor Kaluza and doctor Klein from the palace.%% The two doctors insisted to continue the study of the energy. But, their opinion was ignored and they got dismissed due to other scientists' guile.

Due to the Dark Lord with the energy and the Orc Hero, monsters have started to gain strong powers.%% The crack in the dimension started to widen from the effect of the monsters' change.%% After that, doctor Kaluza and doctor Klein were called in from the palace and got back to work. Because of two doctors' help the situation has seemed to be getting better.

However, after it started much stronger monsters were found!%% Doctor Kaluza and his followers believe the monsters' change was because of the other dimension's attack!%% Therefore, they had started to study a way to attack Dragnoica by using the energy.%% However, doctor Klein and his followers had a different point of view.%% Doctor Klein asked Tailring to take a hero who can help him from the other dimension!

As Tailring asked, heroes came to the Ragnarök world.%% Doctor Klein figured out the cause of monsters' change because of our heroes' help. Due to the divided energy, the Orc Hero and the Dark Lord were united.%% The Orc Hero and the Dark Lord started to mutate other monsters, the crack of the dimension was then created due to those mutant monsters!%% To save the Ragnarök world and prevent doctor Kaluza from attacking the Dragonica world our Heroes must get the Crystal of energy from the Orc Hero and the Dark Lord.

When the Crystal of energy that was combined with the Orc Hero and the Dark Lord was gone the crack in the dimension started to disappear.%% As the crack in the dimension started to disappear doctor Kaluza and his followers stopped their attack on the world of Dragonica.
Because of Heroes' help, peace returned to the World of Ragnarök.
With only one doubt left...
Heheh, I heard that there are many good things here.
You can get a Minble scroll from me, but you should share 10% of your obtained items with me.... secretly!

When I participated in volunteer work around Geffen Town, I overheard that Glast Heim has lots of treasure. So I made up some story that I want to participate in more volunteer work just to come here.%% I would give you a Minble scroll that is really really helpful for you! But only if you give me back 10% of your treasure, deal?
Hi! My name is Clitea, I'm growing sunflowers for my garden. Would you like to help me grow them into pretty flowers?
Sunflowers are loyal and love the Sun, they need it to grow so I can understand why they love it so much.
If you grow this Mysterious bud into a sunflower, I shall give you a reward.

It's a beautiful and shiny summers day. I usually grow beautiful flowers for my garden and invite the villagers over to enjoy it. But this time, I'm afraid I might not have enough time to grow sunflowers.%% My hero, would you help me grow the sunflowers?
Wow! you already have some medals? Let me see .. Yes these are the right medals! I can exchange them for better items if you like?
Halloween race event! Bring me Ghost runner and Burning Ghost runner!
Who is going to get the avatar of Randy?

You can purchase tickets for the race from Daisy. For rewards you will need the Ghost runner and Burning Ghost runner.%% You can exchange Ghost runner with +1 skill ring and for Burning Ghost runner, you can get the avatar ofRandy!
I'm tired of looking for Santa Claus.
I think it'd be much better if Santa Claus steered the sleigh and I gave out the presents.
Where were you wondering around?
I'm fed up with Santa Claus.%% I'd better quit this job and do something else!
I'm the Fairy of Winter, Nia. Winter is my favourite season!
Umm, it's weird to say, but I'm worried about him.
Where has he gone?

Hello! I'm the Fairy of Winter, Nia.%% I'm here to keep Ice Palace safe.%% But I don't know why I'm protecting Ice Palace, though. I just heard it's here for overseeing someone in there, for centuries.
I'm the Fairy of Spring, Waltz. The Fairy of Winter and I take turns, and i also make the spring come back!
I'm tired of wearing the same outfit for several centuries. I think I need to go find a new one!
It's not time for spring just yet! I just came here to visit Nia for a short while.

Nice to see you. I'm the Fairy of Spring, Waltz. Do you know how the spring comes?%% When the changing ceremony is done with the Fairy of Winter and the Fairy of Spring, the Spring starts. You didn't know that right?
Hohoho! How dare you to show up in Ice Palace, you have guts. Rudolph.
Ah.. I'm %name%.
You foolish thing, don't you tell me a lie! I heard Rudolph has a red nose.%% I can see your nose is also red.%% I think your short height also proves that you're Rudolph.
Old lady!? You cocky little kid!%% I'll lock you in here with that stupid Santa Claus!
Well, well, who is this?%% I've heard a lot about you!%% Ha, you finally defeated my sister Mary.
{C=0xFF00863C/}( A rumour about me?){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% Where is Santa Claus?

Oh don't worry. I locked that stupid guy up somewhere, hoho.%% It's for protecting him from chasers like you.%% Stupid Santa Claus! He fell in love with the Fairy of Winter, Nia.%% He mistook me for her mother! Hohoho.. He must have mistook me because of my beautiful face!
{C=0xFF00863C/}(Santa Claus...){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% {C=0xFF00863C/}(is really stupid!){C=0xFF4D0D08/}

He was afraid of me so much and locked me in here. I can only regain my power when the Winter comes.%% I told Santa Claus to take clothes from the Fairy of Winter and clothes from the Fairy of Spring, and Santa Claus was locked in here.%% If the changing ceremony between two fairies doesn't happen then the winter will go on! forever! hahah!%% You're the only one who's trying to stop me..%% Only you. Rudolph!
{C=0xFF00863C/}(Rudolph, again?){C=0xFF4D0D08/}
This can't happen..
{C=0xFF00863C/}(Picking up clothes from the Fairy){C=0xFF4D0D08/}
No! My clothes! Rudolph! You natural predator!
{C=0xFF00863C/}(Natural predator, Rudolph?){C=0xFF4D0D08/}
You made my sister die using your cruel fang. Santa Claus! You're the one who should be blamed for making Rudolph kill my sister..!%% I can never forgive you.
{C=0xFF00863C/}(No, Santa Claus is in danger!){C=0xFF4D0D08/}
Stupid Santa Claus!%% I cannot believe Rudolph has beaten me!
I'm not Rudolph!
I won't hear that kind of excuse. Red nose with short height. You're definitely Rudolph!
{C=0xFF00863C/}(This nose became red just because it's cold here.){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% {C=0xFF00863C/}(You think i'm short?...){C=0xFF4D0D08/}
Ha! See! Are you done with making excuses?%% If Santa Claus' is gone forever then the everlasting Winter stays in the people's mind!
After using all of his power, Santa Claus fell.%% Nia started to cry, holding him.%% However, it was only just a show to get her sympathy.
{C=0xFF00863C/}(Santa Claus is now smiling in Nia's arms.){C=0xFF4D0D08/}%% Ah! Nia is holding me.
Hey! You're a bad Santa Claus! Stop pretending!
{C=0xFF00863C/}(holding Santa Claus' hand){C=0xFF4D0D08/} Santa Claus, are you okay? I was so worried about you!
The Fairy of Winter
Countess Mary
Queen of Snow Batore
Santa Claus
Oh! Nia. I kept dreaming about you.%% Even when my body was tied by cold chains, I felt warm inside of me whenever I thought about you.
Santa Claus, I finally realise my true feelings for you.%% I'm in love..
{C=0xFF00863C/}(Put his finger on her lip){C=0xFF4D0D08/} Nia, don't.%% I don't want this confession to make you feel shy. That shyness of yours is only for me.
Argggg. Please stop, you're making ears bleed, i do not want to hear any of this! Their romantic virus makes me sick!
I can't watch this thing any longer.
Regardless of people watching them, Santa Claus and Nia were holding each other.%% Though they finally stopped their touchy-feely moment after the guards showed up.
Did you just say Santa Claus? Where is Santa Claus?
I don't know the details.%% I just dragged Santa Claus down here as my sister ordered me to do!%% If you got a question find out the answer in hell. Hoho!
Texts for Zodiac
